name: Jon Tester
subject: hill of beans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks—Everywhere you look, the media and political pundits say I’m one of the **“most vulnerable”** Democratic senators and this seat is one of the **“most likely to flip”** in 2024.

[**The target on our backs will only get bigger as we grow this campaign—Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will stop at nothing to take this seat and gain back their majority. So before I go any further, can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me keep my seat and Democrats in control of the Senate?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48886?t=6&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48887?t=7&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48888?t=8&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48889?t=9&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48890?t=10&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48891?t=11&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
The truth is that this race will be tough. The attacks will be nasty, brutal, and downright deceitful. And all of our hard work will amount to a hill of beans if we don’t have the resources to fight back.

I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana—it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way.

We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. **That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families.**

[**What do you say, folks? Can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us win and keep the political pundit prophecies from becoming a reality in Montana?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48886?t=12&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48887?t=13&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48888?t=14&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48889?t=15&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48890?t=16&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48891?t=17&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)
I appreciate your support so much—especially now. Early investments make all the difference, so thank you in advance.

Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=8914%2E878179%2EZbcUQ_)

name: Laurence Tribe
subject: I’m Larry Tribe, Adam’s former professor and life-long friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]Headshot of Professor Laurence Tribe

Hello Derek, I’m
Larry Tribe, Professor of Constitutional Law Emeritus at Harvard
University, Adam’s former law school professor — but most importantly,
lifelong friend.

When Adam attended Harvard he was my research assistant working on
constitutional law. (So was Jamie Raskin!). Working closely together, I
realized a few things about him very quickly — he was driven, smart, and
incredibly good at his job — this was true over 40 years ago, and is still
true today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]Photo of young Adam Schiff in cap and gown at Harvard graduation

I am incredibly proud of the work Adam has gone on to do since his time at
Harvard. His work in Congress has been instrumental in protecting our
democracy. That’s why, when the ludicrous Trump-inspired attack to censure
Adam occurred, I said he should wear this sham attack as a badge of honor.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]Tweet from Laurence Tribe (@tribelaw): Good for @RepAdamSchiff. He
should wear this sham attack as a badge of honor. Those introducing it or
voting for it disgrace their constituents and dishonor themselves.

Derek, when
the Democrats crowded to the front of the chamber after the censure vote,
clapping and cheering for Adam, I would’ve proudly joined them. MAGA
Republicans are doubling down on their attacks on him because they know he
has been one of the most effective members of Congress at investigating
corruption, and holding them accountable.

This “censure” is a badge of honor for Adam and a stain on the history of
the House of Representatives. The right-wing extremists in Congress have
no respect at all for the Constitution they are sworn to uphold. Period.

It is a wonderful opportunity to become close friends with someone and get
to watch how they continue to grow and follow their values and convictions
to help others. That’s why I’m asking for you to support Adam in his
campaign for Senate today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]At a time of extreme polarization in our country, we need Adam in the
Senate now, more than ever. Please join me and give a donation today to
help him fight back against MAGA Republicans and for our country.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2023_abs_em.wTG104&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for helping Adam. It means a great deal.

— Larry

Laurence Tribe
Carl M. Loeb University Professor, Emeritus

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2771%2E5257348%2EydD91N ]Privacy Policy

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze92994ko7soj46lkimnmpjuugouj0vsortim3eg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i6ep30cjh2bs)
---

Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf80c9bh7q2ehhcko6s9kgtdqaohp3klr6q4p1e8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i6ep30cjh2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z40hn57fb84kjg1uibj881fsq3chmk8fbjbugp9g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i6ep30cjh2bs)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2h9pi4nn6gqu3ltqu6km1dci6i6cngk9gctad8o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i6ep30cjh2bs "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Hey Peter!

I wanted to drop you a personal note of appreciation for being a part of our movement here in Mississippi, especially during such a crucial time for our campaign.

Seriously, I really mean it.

Running a campaign like ours isn't a walk in the park, and it definitely ain't cheap. But thanks to incredible supporters like you from Mississippi and across the nation, we've kept this race mighty competitive against Tate Reeves. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65888928/414766219/-1470085607?refcode=ea.3be7e20a-c319-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3be7e20a-c319-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JlN2UyMGEtYzMxOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bt81BC0w-oumiGO6Nj0DQ_JqCXvCRppDtk2Vq84jq24=) I jumped into this race because I have a deep love for Mississippi. I can't bear the thought of another four years of self-serving leadership and corruption ruining our great state.

November is our opportunity to make a change.

So, here's my humble request: [With Election Day just a few months away, we can't afford to slow down if we want to move our state forward. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvt76dl16ooolr8f28phprq98potgbmnb3opu100_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i61o34c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsiku5er6k0d0m4vtmcb05qbs48ounufi4n64k8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i61o34c5h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1c2aanuatj01m6mp3f3ehem33k0ojmg5ksnv098_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i61o34c5h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk8dsvkbcdu5v4rq3ac07vsnngnieb4o10oc608o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5i61o34c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Document Alleging Bidens’ Bribery Scheme with Burisma Owner
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Justice for a copy of the Federal Bureau of Investigation(FBI) FD-1023 that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.”

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 3, 2023

### [Trump indictment exposes the DOJ’s two-tiered justice system ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63997&L=29770&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtaW5kaWN0bWVudC1leHBvc2VzLXRoZS1kb2pzLXR3by10aWVyZWQtanVzdGljZS1zeXN0ZW0vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c94d115deaf43df472a51f937e386115dbbe2c946732f46a55efff9c330c64a9) Washington Examiner The politically motivated and “count stacked” indictment of former President Donald Trump by special counsel Jack Smith is an assault on the foundations of our democracy and an alarming testament to the weaponization of the Biden justice system. The principles of fairness and impartiality that underpin our rule of law have swiftly eroded — Hunter Biden’s recent sweetheart plea deal only confirms that point. Indeed, the justice system’s refusal to take seriously allegations of Biden family corruption while pursuing what seems to be a vendetta against Trump have left the public’s faith in equal justice shaken to the core. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63997&L=29770&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtaW5kaWN0bWVudC1leHBvc2VzLXRoZS1kb2pzLXR3by10aWVyZWQtanVzdGljZS1zeXN0ZW0vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c94d115deaf43df472a51f937e386115dbbe2c946732f46a55efff9c330c64a9)

### [Why Trump Had a Right to Keep the Documents ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63997&L=29764&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtZG9jdW1lbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b148b7e56a65d8fbd1c3511490fdd9ab077116a81546e7d01e8dc367a56b8cb5) The Wall Street Journal The recent indictment implies that Donald Trump received the 31 records when he was president and that he intended to control them because he placed them in boxes, retaining them. At this point, only the government knows whether those records were created for President Trump. But that fact probably doesn’t matter. Another D.C. Circuit panel in 1993 explained that the purpose of the “agency record” exception in the Presidential Records Act was to prevent a president from defining “presidential records” as “all records produced or received by, or in the possession or under the control of, any government agency or employee of the United States.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63997&L=29764&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtZG9jdW1lbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b148b7e56a65d8fbd1c3511490fdd9ab077116a81546e7d01e8dc367a56b8cb5)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Justice for a copy of the Federal Bureau of Investigation(FBI) FD-1023 that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 3, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “This FBI document, which is being hidden contrary to law, could be the Rosetta Stone to uncovering unprecedented corruption by our nation’s top elected official,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The American people have a right under to law to see this FBI document so they can judge for themselves whether their president and his family are crooks.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch and AEF argued in their briefs that the court should reject a prior 1978 Supreme Court opinion that seemingly authorizes racial discrimination in college admissions (Regents of Univ. of Cal. V. Bakke, 438 U.S. 265 (1978)). Since Bakke, there have been “at least 26 separate opinions. Many of these have attempted to explain the constitutional rationale for allowing race-based preferences, even though those rationales appear to directly conflict with the original meaning and text of the Equal Protection Clause.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that former Virginia magistrate Elizabeth Fuller and officials of the Office of the Executive Secretary of the Supreme Court of Virginia (“OES”) have agreed to resolve Ms. Fuller’s First Amendment lawsuit challenging her termination. ---|--- | | | | | More than two decades after Islamic terrorists exploited the U.S. government’s inefficient system for tracking foreigners who overstay visas, the problem is only getting worse with a startling 853,955 visa overstays in fiscal year 2022. A new report issued by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) tries to downplay the severity of the situation by shining a light on the positive, that the overstay rate is a mere 3.67% compared to 96.33% of over 23 million nonimmigrants that departed the country on time in accordance with the terms of their admission. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner The politically motivated and “count stacked” indictment of former President Donald Trump by special counsel Jack Smith is an assault on the foundations of our democracy and an alarming testament to the weaponization of the Biden justice system. The principles of fairness and impartiality that underpin our rule of law have swiftly eroded — Hunter Biden’s recent sweetheart plea deal only confirms that point. Indeed, the justice system’s refusal to take seriously allegations of Biden family corruption while pursuing what seems to be a vendetta against Trump have left the public’s faith in equal justice shaken to the core. The Wall Street Journal The recent indictment implies that Donald Trump received the 31 records when he was president and that he intended to control them because he placed them in boxes, retaining them. At this point, only the government knows whether those records were created for President Trump. But that fact probably doesn’t matter. Another D.C. Circuit panel in 1993 explained that the purpose of the “agency record” exception in the Presidential Records Act was to prevent a president from defining “presidential records” as “all records produced or received by, or in the possession or under the control of, any government agency or employee of the United States.” Fox News The White House received backlash Saturday after it was reported that Hunter Biden was accompanying his father to Camp David amid bombshell whistleblower allegations of political corruption – along with recently pleading guilty to federal tax charges and agreeing to plea deal on a felony gun charge. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

subject: America’s most abysmal teachers

body:
My seat is crucial to taking back our Republican Majority | | | This is absolutely HORRIFYING.

**A group of teachers were caught trading tips on how to help kids try to change their gender while hiding it from parents.**

**And as if that wasn’t bad enough, they were doing it at a workshop FUNDED BY THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT.**

That’s right – Under Biden, your tax dollars are going DIRECTLY to Left-wing teachers trying to indoctrinate your children.

The Left wants to take away YOUR right to parent your own children, and I won’t stand for it.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Libtery Delivered is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fedae124a2e4904961ce48e0792ad8d&_e=tAcjkYSyBPd7kjTQs7lHNRpjc0_gNHZ7ILYmM20DOgVUP5L4pzknHDk-morDmmFf5L3z6vfjiUUolkHW1BqxeLQRHfUNtkAkquNH2fVYYQiLJx_FRG9uzu_sBX30UsD9b5MJXOGOwXZ-N9ZikkJkskqL44HSO3c-G-p7JqG6HlLhlYTLoEBkW5-OzRAxp2_F7eW46F7UFhJCe4whC6GP4x6KI7Z_2eA6p2bJFYt69zj_Wy59mVQIlcEm2mZ2G4SR_UK0qzl50_A8ocdMa3Tt72CwRl0R74lADM-bbyLO6BqK9WI1buuL00Jlo7h6cEVf3psZXNwFVYzBEmZNtT6oQY6gJ3iD0MeHzTTYaB80d5dg_M8KjD8eAWlKYVYYAmtikSskQ5XIfOnrc53-Jt-7VA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fedae124a2e4904961ce48e0792ad8d&_e=tAcjkYSyBPd7kjTQs7lHNRpjc0_gNHZ7ILYmM20DOgVUP5L4pzknHDk-morDmmFf5L3z6vfjiUUolkHW1BqxeLQRHfUNtkAkquNH2fVYYQiLJx_FRG9uzu_sBX30UsD9b5MJXOGOwXZ-N9ZikkJkskqL44HSO3c-G-p7JqG6HlLhlYTLoEBkW5-OzRAxp2_F7eW46F7UFhJCe4whC6GP4x6KI7Z_2eA6p2bJFYt69zj_Wy59mVQIlcEm2mZ2G4SRCpkIDOV92N90gLrokNFvclvmtrCq19gcDiMViLrwSpz1BS5rSE5_uYcs_f_e5ffbn3Rz0pS7H1QvwTZHBq7q1PLkGdHLRb-knvFV53PDdk6okFB2MIP3SOjC9rMGVUGl_ZaXtDyiBer5JMgdszMCiA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fedae124a2e4904961ce48e0792ad8d&_e=tAcjkYSyBPd7kjTQs7lHNRpjc0_gNHZ7ILYmM20DOgVUP5L4pzknHDk-morDmmFf5L3z6vfjiUUolkHW1BqxeLQRHfUNtkAkquNH2fVYYQiLJx_FRG9uzu_sBX30UsD9b5MJXOGOwXZ-N9ZikkJkskqL44HSO3c-G-p7JqG6HlLhlYTLoEBkW5-OzRAxp2_F7eW46F7UFhJCe4whC6GP4x6KI7Z_2eA6p2bJFYt69zj_Wy59mVQIlcEm2mZ2G4SRML9dVMFYEOmGbUWS9OUiy6XjihF5HljNI89fxwbEG-m0ZPiPHfDXbld-1puFmuSuc32Ds4tSJIBlgIaMXO9krqmR_dBJmynxUXFfJ0yWDFzJWhAJdI4ZFVjj5RLWln78ZgJWbPJ6QY1ORyJWE3Lknw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fedae124a2e4904961ce48e0792ad8d&_e=tAcjkYSyBPd7kjTQs7lHNRpjc0_gNHZ7ILYmM20DOgVUP5L4pzknHDk-morDmmFf5L3z6vfjiUUolkHW1BqxeLQRHfUNtkAkquNH2fVYYQiLJx_FRG9uzu_sBX30UsD9b5MJXOGOwXZ-N9ZikkJkskqL44HSO3c-G-p7JqG6HlLhlYTLoEBkW5-OzRAxp2_F7eW46F7UFhJCe4whC6GP4x6KI7Z_2eA6p2bJFYt69zj_Wy59mVQIlcEm2mZ2G4SRZhS5GOwqZg4mbu2IPZJZznUppd_4xFq0uznJDAyL3xkT0t_VX5x4QRYXWnknObWj5y5vW7ho7EchxWGyieUN58JGq7_KwHgKx5pW-rB9vQFCo7xlUHoApqm2AYq--EnZhcBcD0QnrqZMIY6l7RrgDg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fedae124a2e4904961ce48e0792ad8d&_e=tAcjkYSyBPd7kjTQs7lHNRpjc0_gNHZ7ILYmM20DOgVUP5L4pzknHDk-morDmmFf5L3z6vfjiUUolkHW1BqxeLQRHfUNtkAkquNH2fVYYQiLJx_FRG9uzu_sBX30UsD9b5MJXOGOwXZ-N9ZikkJkskqL44HSO3c-G-p7JqG6HlLhlYTLoEBkW5-OzRAxp2_F7eW46F7UFhJCe4whC6GP4x6KI7Z_2eA6p2bJFYt69zj_Wy59mVQIlcEm2mZ2G4SRzTdBtE1y37ZvDG8RTaSAPaHGhYswzsMRTHqtkTSHADQeRuKEi2czso6DDzOczH8RlXzXLbEaCyu6ZiMUFqScLAXu-Q04R0nL6D0N1yyRsVgBqrxz1IOwFGJ-PT8R5HyLEa-rhNdT0KV0q4H7QfFLIw%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

This is a big deal. ")**

name: Mark Mullet
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Since I announced my campaign just one month ago, we’ve received an outpouring of support from across the state. I’m especially grateful for the support I’ve received from grassroots members of our team like you!

Thanks to you, our first public fundraising report will show widespread support for our movement.

I’ve heard from countless folks across Washington who are excited about the future we’re building for families, businesses, and communities in our state. Together, I know we can make Washington a safer, more affordable place where everyone can thrive.

I’m thrilled to have you on this journey with me. I hope you’ll follow our campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65890616/414771811/2061300449?source=MM_EM_EN_30DO_230703_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJiZGJjMC1jODE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66zTX5_iADj0xH8MasLrY_5hTo6N6atLDviXCN09RgQ=&emci=7104a038-9f19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e72bdbc0-c819-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65890623/414771820/1225136338?source=MM_EM_EN_30DO_230703_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJiZGJjMC1jODE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66zTX5_iADj0xH8MasLrY_5hTo6N6atLDviXCN09RgQ=&emci=7104a038-9f19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e72bdbc0-c819-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65890634/414771824/-1192649029?source=MM_EM_EN_30DO_230703_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJiZGJjMC1jODE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66zTX5_iADj0xH8MasLrY_5hTo6N6atLDviXCN09RgQ=&emci=7104a038-9f19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e72bdbc0-c819-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) to hear about everything we’ve got planned in the coming months.

Enjoy your Fourth of July holiday with friends and family!

Mark

clean_body: | | Since I announced my campaign just one month ago, we’ve received an outpouring of support from across the state. I’m especially grateful for the support I’ve received from grassroots members of our team like you! Thanks to you, our first public fundraising report will show widespread support for our movement. I’ve heard from countless folks across Washington who are excited about the future we’re building for families, businesses, and communities in our state. Together, I know we can make Washington a safer, more affordable place where everyone can thrive. I’m thrilled to have you on this journey with me. I hope you’ll follow our campaign on , , and to hear about everything we’ve got planned in the coming months. Enjoy your Fourth of July holiday with friends and family! Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

body:
Last quarter we had 576 grassroots donations from people like you!

Thank you.

Your generous and unwavering support of our campaign makes all the difference. My team and I are thrilled to wrap up an amazing quarter and are gearing up for a busy summer.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you, and have a very happy Independence Day tomorrow!

Andy

body:
Home sweet home.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230703-4577-header&t=1&akid=4577%2E2526796%2Erhhsat)
Here’s a peek into what a weekend off looks like for Alexandria:
Alexandria is able to be a different kind of politician because her life looks so much like the working people she came to Congress to fight for. She doesn’t spend her weekends at glitzy fundraisers. She comes home and spends it living in community with the people she represents.

name: Stop Cop City (via Working Families Power)
subject: Help get this referendum on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St
body:
Decisions about our communities should be made by the people directly impacted. | | | Peter, **For two years, residents of Atlanta, Georgia have fought tirelessly to stop "Cop City"** — the proposed $90 million training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city for weapons and explosion testing, helicopter landings, and controlled building burn. Now, we have a chance to take this question to a direct vote that could let the people of Atlanta decide their own future. **We have less than 60 days to collect 70,000 petition signatures from registered Atlanta voters to get a referendum on the ballot that would let the people decide the fate of Cop City.** ******[Can you pitch in to help us get as many signatures as possible and get this referendum on the ballot?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yd_36ZKRjbSzo9SzhE5KR5RB-dMC0pqZaY8qX-WsO5utB3ySZhKiY_a8jfr0prWl2hd-NlooKUp2OQiA0He9lp-9XE37btpNt3_pDDJs7ovqKMXN987epCcPA-ZMQkLOFFly6GZIjtXf9cJiOw-UyAmUSsua3PE3HFJ71uk8kNhOaP8nXt2AlbOagtcezLQFZ0njvVqExxthx2rIesivZcHCAe6WZ53c5sfPvYRbmmuJPltHZGjdjfpUuwS8CimFMEe0gVhQjvFMO6UY5_TsxEI8C32hNEGSseHvKq1sz20S6TMRK6NOph6kRTDv22dxR_--bzRuiziFhNd8nQ5SQpkjchXZwnKlL_egCRV5LMFKwi5OJqazgNNPoLvyX3J8vN-GoWvSFC9uRU1aCXXluMtEBA0CYPyWDNPDCC6hu4hA/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h0/CC80-F0I0098XirBoMltHYLD2ea--pFoK3SwDuOoUSs)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVPqbBRlPSL0yY-2SxNtmqcTJXW5VUGiiEcZSy5MRkHHdCSO840h-0LSZFYnnW1c3R8TdAfqjvDnRhVTPRSbJT8-owrRHXEfkGp1kfB53Ep_x9__Y6-h3D6ylNi-Zg7pt1BDY-4STZA59q-9W5au6gsiJiTTV3fmwmDcHuyh9OloBmlHIwsLCMKgYMSaNoL_IPHMGiOXxJZbg22qjCt_I_uB1tdbydE6Cdm1ObGOSaURdLDjWIoLgz0s74W0rPJFDQQCeBQwa8y6uV4VjOCco9cqn4OXgwtw5zQib1hKf_lIK5ZxBsqRzwKsdF1GLeQfb9qQ4o57t0bg-f7Dshd0GnTibgVI65C_WlxnEw96KSHZGKAzWiQsk4gyy0_LNaB653Q/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h1/9fo_xHhXBThmKYk1CoEN7AV_LWDombDFD0A-IhK3J8I) **[Donate now >>](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVPqbBRlPSL0yY-2SxNtmqcTJXW5VUGiiEcZSy5MRkHHd_HBfM88e--dTiTux6AROvlUWWGIKInwAvisbwsGN9dTyLc0tr7y0Q4MIZEk_nUqG_szWXHjm4XmizhJIUZ9ZjGmdxJzqn7NAJPoYgaoOLX5IPTxOBdGy_EsjKUxLlUYVjczAsV531zSU1wJFWir7kKpiZnxatJ4iqzp32ZgIgZauq-Pap1_9y63kMzkrIF6PxEpKy0Lb5iipxWJ3Z94EET8OXcU-tBtm0jODLTTa-kZ0k8h2PmCsap4Lea9-QTRF7IeZnmnxzcwiz97UedDhK0fyvfeWgEMhBt1u2zPicJdKnGSA-lx0gKA6tYKQqTBWtmO-4lh3feUxvMVHGi4Waw/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h2/c21pEMuSFNdIsFZslLAhstwAzYf87CYT7FlBI7urt6c)** Activists in Atlanta have organized protests, occupied the Weelaunee Forest, canvassed their neighbors, called city council members, raised funds, and built a joyful movement fighting for a city that works for the many, not the few. But the politicians who are pushing Cop City want to divide Atlanta and further militarize the police. They put corporations and organizations like the Atlanta Police Foundation over the needs of the people. Time and time again, the people of Atlanta have told them that they don’t want Cop City, and yet they vote to fund it anyway. **This cycle needs to end. That's why we need to take Cop City to a city-wide referendum.** It will take all of us, wherever we're from, to help get this referendum on the ballot so we can defeat Cop City for good. Over the next two months, organizers will need to gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 70,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process — in the process building a more educated, engaged, and empowered city. **[Chip in now to ensure we have the resources we need to get this initiative on the ballot and Let Atlanta Decide:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVPqbBRlPSL0yY-2SxNtmqcTJXW5VUGiiEcZSy5MRkHHdEIkRnMDWKKm_UkZv9oTCnnSVvC-OQcc5DNBvwWEkacRQiv5HExrIQI9XxD3s7zjg4q0Y9TxoWP49-EXfSAvd8OpwciTD2egyAF25L3zFs9Mz9F7AzXWltUEzR0bp3HSDEt0c1LWHFKykLvdZnHH68IynTlCuNjD1217oPiqRqoyXqpyuWAVjRFU31_WJECwgLUkKZB1lIzyXT7cudtvgniQnSzNlpjb-D_X1G3nDYz8auGldGvB79546mlE7SzgEJGelLYuPwBZgrsoepOH44kiNZ-JM0HhBbCgdkvBBBj3BmTQxZa7QykYwlwgZ7RfP7RLXnyFgk7MtRa5ocW4pgg/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h3/wSVjw25jz3z8APG4lrXRIsIz89TTV6wnMi-5j9yh8WE)** **[Donate now >>](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVPqbBRlPSL0yY-2SxNtmqcTJXW5VUGiiEcZSy5MRkHHdEiuaTnG54uQ1Q8tlXkCjCUeDoiLXWdJVJCcom-jhKdOt-Kee2SmZ49lRvRu4_RRQzUn5f5hMejzI3qXMjmCUpzqd7fGpJ1ABm0ZTXWS-Qr3CEycaRYjO7u12bn0M3nX9tcFIKcMAKiAtuwp-x2xZcQt8ErXkVtDa_coCLADH4MCayOY4tRYrpahh89g9dwDCeUOS5uWzfyEXH8tAq6Ba0sPsxwNq-zXT3JXz6avNw_RSZYquYK98ujIdAKV6ENxQbCQIKkG0XBma1HLVyrt2tWFZ2V5LioozEY3A_v0X8jv_eSdDMi9vT6gNw2SGrIIPQkov5ZNW-bu-9a8YtOnaVQ/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h4/hvzfFg2mR0IMapuhHn0eCFkYyR7T8wncSi3N0rTRAZ8)** The primary supporters of Cop City are corporations that donate to the Atlanta Police Foundation, like Home Depot, UPS, Waffle House, and other billion-dollar entities that are wielding their economic power to manipulate city government.1
**We think decisions about our communities should be made by the people directly impacted — not billionaires and the politicians they buy.** **[Join our movement against corporate greed and police terror. Donate here to help Working Families Power get this important initiative on the ballot in Atlanta.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVPqbBRlPSL0yY-2SxNtmqcTJXW5VUGiiEcZSy5MRkHHdD4f3WEGWlV_m6FN7r45PWN1C5ZTAyD05frSSVNfh1G9SkgJT7FA7lo2-g6R-Bt7d4XhL_FiLvi4d7mvgUlUIkNefBaQX5-0rEOHXT2qCvzns2clJBQrZSq16p2FVAOE7g7dSeTB9-aS8VbuW3gcqdBmbgrZ3KJCy_eE5S9Nwn2UKXV94SSEj1oyek2m4-k0cyYNpYiRI9eR5u0Pq3ctnOOsD59CNdjWRv_jnXwgELuNMhcZWmohHWoKshTEIcoRzspr4Tz-4RL5mDp-FVEIjCOR3e2nBwRM_no3N7ta6_s1KC4a6KOL2Q5SwKt6s5HWItWQZpc3WxEdNm5Wj0UNkig/3xk/DSmORjrsTyKYFKuEckVHQQ/h5/Fxsd4K0z155kTa75kI_eNSiCqqosP4Rx-dWTB-Ticf0)** In solidarity, Working Families Power Source:

clean_body: Decisions about our communities should be made by the people directly impacted. | | | Peter, For two years, residents of Atlanta, Georgia have fought tirelessly to stop "Cop City" — the proposed $90 million training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city for weapons and explosion testing, helicopter landings, and controlled building burn. Now, we have a chance to take this question to a direct vote that could let the people of Atlanta decide their own future. We have less than 60 days to collect 70,000 petition signatures from registered Atlanta voters to get a referendum on the ballot that would let the people decide the fate of Cop City. **** Activists in Atlanta have organized protests, occupied the Weelaunee Forest, canvassed their neighbors, called city council members, raised funds, and built a joyful movement fighting for a city that works for the many, not the few. But the politicians who are pushing Cop City want to divide Atlanta and further militarize the police. They put corporations and organizations like the Atlanta Police Foundation over the needs of the people. Time and time again, the people of Atlanta have told them that they don’t want Cop City, and yet they vote to fund it anyway. This cycle needs to end. That's why we need to take Cop City to a city-wide referendum. It will take all of us, wherever we're from, to help get this referendum on the ballot so we can defeat Cop City for good. Over the next two months, organizers will need to gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 70,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process — in the process building a more educated, engaged, and empowered city. The primary supporters of Cop City are corporations that donate to the Atlanta Police Foundation, like Home Depot, UPS, Waffle House, and other billion-dollar entities that are wielding their economic power to manipulate city government.1 We think decisions about our communities should be made by the people directly impacted — not billionaires and the politicians they buy. In solidarity, Working Families Power Source: 1\. , Eyes on the Ties , November 15, 2022 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. Want to learn more about Working Families Power? Help us build the movement power to win a democracy for the many — not the wealthy and powerful few. Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Data Team, Courier Newsroom
subject: Short, 1-click poll for Peter
body:
At Courier Newsroom, our mission is to combat this kind of bad information — not give it more oxygen just to drive ratings and profits.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)
**Peter, t****he mainstream media has been giving Donald Trump wall-to-wall coverage since news of his indictment first broke.**
National news organizations have rushed to cover his every move, even broadcasting live feeds of his plane landing. And every time they give him a platform, he’s a firehose of disinformation, spreading lies about voter fraud, the January 6th insurrection, the 2020 election results, and more.
Americans are tired of the mainstream media’s profit- and ratings-driven coverage that prioritizes sensationalism over important fact-based news. Some even fear a repeat of 2016 where networks like CNN prominently featured Trump despite his constant lies, inadvertently helping him on his way to the White House.
**So what do you think? Should the media continue to let Donald Trump’s every move blot out the sun, or should they hold him accountable for spreading dangerous lies and disinformation on their airwaves? [Take our quick, 1-click poll:](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/1-click-poll/?source=em-20230703&t=8&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)**
**Should the mainstream media be giving Trump primetime coverage?** Yes ✅ No ❌ **[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/1-click-poll/?source=em-20230703&t=9&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)**
---
In 2016, it was mainstream media networks like CNN that helped legitimize Trump and his candidacy by giving him constant coverage to drive ads revenue — all while Trump berated them as ‘fake news.’
Right now, we’re concerned they’re falling into the same trap but we want to get a sense of what our supporters think and — depending on the responses we get — what you think our next steps should be.
[**Will you take 30 seconds to respond to our easy, 1-click poll?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/1-click-poll/?source=em-20230703&t=10&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)
**[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/1-click-poll/?source=em-20230703&t=11&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)**
Thanks for taking part in this important poll,
The Data Team at Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=12&refcode2=1194_120351_uI1YnI&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1194%2E120351%2EuI1YnI)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:

Peter,

Independence Day is a special time for us to remember our Founding Fathers and the struggles of all the patriots, who forged our nation centuries ago.
[_**This Independence Day, donate $1 to Mayor Francis Suarez’s campaign and declare your independence from Joe Biden’s failed liberal policies!**_](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=e825f7fb29&e=9562ca5d98)
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=dbd35d574a&e=9562ca5d98)

**We must rekindle their spirit - the American Spirit, a spirit of hard work, innovation, and courage that led our founding fathers to risk everything, including their lives for what they believed in.**
Today, Joe Biden and the Radical Left will tell you that America needs to apologize for its past and that their liberal policies will lead America to its best days.
**They are wrong.**
Biden’s failed policies have created chaos, unleashing waves of mass illegal migration, record-high inflation, and wide-spread crime.
[ _**< <<< DONATE NOW >>>>>>**_](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=ed9bd2d02a&e=9562ca5d98)
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=b004eeac6e&e=9562ca5d98)
Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez is the son of Cuban immigrants who fled Communist Cuba for a better life in America.
After serving as a Miami City Commissioner, he became the first Miami-born Mayor of the city in 2017.
Mayor Suarez is a fierce advocate for law and order, fiscal responsibility, and pro-business policies. He upholds conservative principles and advocates for the well-being of his constituents. Under his leadership, Miami has undergone a significant transformation, serving as a model for the rest of the country.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: You are what makes our grassroots operations powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Thank you for everything you did to help out my campaign this past quarter.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892491/414777882/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230702TY_N_JW_FULL_3_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTYzOTQzNy1jZTE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2e7DBE3xVfHXstzndfjO5Z4Zpt7UA4yTuwnYUeJjBE=)
---
Hi friend — I hope you’re getting to enjoy this long summer weekend! I wanted to take a minute to thank you for everything you did to help out my campaign this past quarter.

Your support allowed me to continue the work of early outreach in a district that will help determine control of the House, and it meant that I could begin to do my part on behalf of some of the incredible Democratic state legislative candidates who are running in the Commonwealth this year. As this summer continues, I’m looking forward to hitting the trail in key State House and State Senate districts — we have a real chance to secure a strong legislative majority against Glenn Youngkin’s far-right agenda, and I plan to expend every possible effort into making a blue wave happen in November.

You are what makes our grassroots operations powerful, and your belief in our cause and values inspires me every day. I’m more determined than ever to continue the fight for opportunity, equality, and progress, and to keep delivering results for my constituents.

Again, thank you so much.

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. clean_body: Thank you for everything you did to help out my campaign this past quarter. = Hi friend — I hope you’re getting to enjoy this long summer weekend! I wanted to take a minute to thank you for everything you did to help out my campaign this past quarter. Your support allowed me to continue the work of early outreach in a district that will help determine control of the House, and it meant that I could begin to do my part on behalf of some of the incredible Democratic state legislative candidates who are running in the Commonwealth this year. As this summer continues, I’m looking forward to hitting the trail in key State House and State Senate districts — we have a real chance to secure a strong legislative majority against Glenn Youngkin’s far-right agenda, and I plan to expend every possible effort into making a blue wave happen in November. You are what makes our grassroots operations powerful, and your belief in our cause and values inspires me every day. I’m more determined than ever to continue the fight for opportunity, equality, and progress, and to keep delivering results for my constituents. Again, thank you so much. Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you for doing your part:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We hit our goal thanks to this incredible grassroots team! |
#
Team, thank you for your incredible support during our end-of-quarter fundraising drive! It’s during times like these that I’m reminded of how strong we are when we come together to fight for our values. Your generosity means the world to me. And thanks to this team, we hit our end-of-quarter goal! Now, all eyes are on next year’s elections. Mitch McConnell and MAGA Republicans see an opening for them to take back the Senate majority — which means they’re going to spend whatever it takes to attack Democratic senators up for reelection like Amy Klobuchar and Jon Tester. Senate Republicans are set on taking us backward. They want to hollow out the middle class, restrict our rights even further by passing a national abortion ban, and protect their twice-impeached, twice-indicted leader Donald Trump, even if that means trashing our democracy in the process. We sure have our work cut out for us. Every dollar you give toward important goals (like the one we just closed the books on!) allows us to build a strong, nationwide grassroots movement that can go toe-to-toe with the dark money funding the other side. We should expect a lot of bad-faith, dishonest, right-wing attacks to be hurtling toward us over the next year or so, but at the same time, I feel so grateful for everyone on this team. **It’s so important to me that this work really is powered by the people — and you’re making that happen.** The only way Democrats can protect the Senate majority is if we hold strong, and you’re doing your part every time you pitch in on a message from me or my team. I hope you have a wonderful and patriotic Independence Day tomorrow. Thank you, thank you, thank you. — Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892499/414777893/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC60_20230703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2Y2NDQ2MC1jZTE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLDVqyn9DAkCyKWp0zqSonSP5lwPkJR-31Fac_wdAXo=)

subject: 📎 I need your input, Peter

body:
---
| | | Peter, I just launched my first Mid-Year Priorities Survey – and what I need most right now is your personal feedback to guide Democrats through this critical chapter in our country’s history.

[**_It would mean so much if you’d take 10 seconds to share your priorities with me and tell me what Democrats should focus on. I’m relying on your input to guide our strategy to take back the House. Will you help me reach 10,000 responses so I can get an accurate sample size? >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892782/414778815/1707618179?source=20230702_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_flip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMGE5ZC1jZjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGXcys1UuWXgtk9vMBEN6FQq9wJY0QDBrhLBPROqgY4=&emci=01b0b57d-b519-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a1b30a9d-cf19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)

---
Peter, I only have one ask to make of you:
[_**Now that we are six months into the new Congress, will you take 10 seconds to share your feedback and tell me what you want Democrats to focus on right now? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892785/414778818/1707618179?source=20230702_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_flip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMGE5ZC1jZjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGXcys1UuWXgtk9vMBEN6FQq9wJY0QDBrhLBPROqgY4=&emci=01b0b57d-b519-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a1b30a9d-cf19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
[**We’ve already accomplished a lot:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892786/414778819/1707618179?source=20230702_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_flip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMGE5ZC1jZjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGXcys1UuWXgtk9vMBEN6FQq9wJY0QDBrhLBPROqgY4=&emci=01b0b57d-b519-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a1b30a9d-cf19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
– Saved America from the right-wing plot to crash the economy
– Protected Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid and veterans’ benefits
– Lowered the cost of Insulin to $35 per month for millions of Americans
[**But here’s what we’re facing:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892787/414778820/1707618179?source=20230702_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_flip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMGE5ZC1jZjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGXcys1UuWXgtk9vMBEN6FQq9wJY0QDBrhLBPROqgY4=&emci=01b0b57d-b519-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a1b30a9d-cf19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
– Bogus attempts to impeach President Biden
– An obsession with tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations
– Insurrectionist sympathizers who embrace lawlessness and disorder
**[_**At this critical juncture, I need to hear from my strongest supporters. It would mean so much if you could take 10 seconds right now to tell me your priorities for the remainder of this year. I need 10,000 responses before midnight to make sure we’re ready to go. Will you take my survey now? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65892788/414778821/1707618179?source=20230702_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_flip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMGE5ZC1jZjE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGXcys1UuWXgtk9vMBEN6FQq9wJY0QDBrhLBPROqgY4=&emci=01b0b57d-b519-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a1b30a9d-cf19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)**
I can’t wait to see what you have to say!
Keep the faith,
Hakeem

clean_body: | | | Peter, I just launched my first Mid-Year Priorities Survey – and what I need most right now is your personal feedback to guide Democrats through this critical chapter in our country’s history. | Peter, I only have one ask to make of you: – Saved America from the right-wing plot to crash the economy – Protected Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid and veterans’ benefits – Lowered the cost of Insulin to $35 per month for millions of Americans – Bogus attempts to impeach President Biden – An obsession with tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations – Insurrectionist sympathizers who embrace lawlessness and disorder I can’t wait to see what you have to say! Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65893567/414780924/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.03_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjI5YzRkNS1kMTE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dROFtymxHtYEmfABI__gbxL03YEnkqFefusC33yTmNk=)
Peter,

**This grassroots team never fails to amaze me.** With your generosity and grassroots support, we were able to exceed our second end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I truly can’t thank you enough.

**If last week’s end-of-quarter deadline showed us anything, it’s that no challenge is too great for this people-powered campaign.**

We’ve faced tough fights before — and we certainly know we’ll face many more — but it couldn’t be more clear that, if we stick together, we can accomplish anything we put our hearts and minds to.

I’m endlessly grateful for everything you do for this campaign, Peter.

So from the bottom of my heart: Thank you. I hope you have a wonderful Fourth of July holiday!

_— Emilia_

clean_body: = Peter, This grassroots team never fails to amaze me. With your generosity and grassroots support, we were able to exceed our second end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I truly can’t thank you enough. If last week’s end-of-quarter deadline showed us anything, it’s that no challenge is too great for this people-powered campaign. We’ve faced tough fights before — and we certainly know we’ll face many more — but it couldn’t be more clear that, if we stick together, we can accomplish anything we put our hearts and minds to. I’m endlessly grateful for everything you do for this campaign, Peter. So from the bottom of my heart: Thank you. I hope you have a wonderful Fourth of July holiday! — Emilia | = A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. subject: This is a huge accomplishment, team.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65894653/414781904/1924984212?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRhYmI0M2QtZDMxOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tz1-NzQY712cAbAwOL5p3SRkS78J2bWEK64F4ziATT0=)
Wow, I’m blown away!

I’m so excited to share that we met our FEC filing goal! This is a huge accomplishment, and we couldn’t have done it without you.

Thank you so much for your support. It truly means the world to me.

Now that we’ve met this milestone, we’re full steam ahead heading into July. I’m looking forward to getting out there and meeting you and your families and continuing to build on our incredible momentum.

**Arizonans deserve someone who will fight for them, not the MAGA agenda, so I’m committed to building a campaign strong enough to beat David Schweikert. With your help, we’re well on our way to doing that.**

I’m in awe of what we’ve been able to build in such a short amount of time, friend. I’m so grateful that you’re part of it.

I hope you have a safe and relaxing Fourth of July.

Thank you again,

Marlene

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: TERRIBLE NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

This is their latest attempt to tear down their opposition. It’s despicable, and we must hold them to account. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | You heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more. They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson. In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House. It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side. It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. With these wins, we can keep two Democratic fighters standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic actions and pushing for progress in Tennessee. Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond. body:

Peter, five years ago, I made a promise to myself.
When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless, that I would speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this priorities survey is a key part of keeping it today. **
Peter, I will _never_ stop fighting for you and your loved ones. But to do my absolute best, I need to know what concerns matter to you most. **That’s why I’m counting on you to help me get 5,000 responses to my July Priorities Survey. **
**[_Please, will you take my priorities survey before midnight tonight?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65896718/414784471/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1127-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWRkMTY3Yy1kNDE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zddBv44sOWt73HCEfwNl2JN77FfsmNJnLcBEQrsCDUk=&emci=8752eb74-b116-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e5dd167c-d419-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

In recent months, we've put a stop to anti-abortion extremists, taken on the epidemic of senseless gun violence, and fought against record amounts of LGBTQ+ hate – all because my supporters told me how much those issues meant to them.
**But the year is halfway over – and I need your input as we look ahead to the rest of 2023.**
**So, please: I’m looking for 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities.[_Will you take 60 seconds now to share your biggest concerns with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65896721/414784474/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1127-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWRkMTY3Yy1kNDE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zddBv44sOWt73HCEfwNl2JN77FfsmNJnLcBEQrsCDUk=&emci=8752eb74-b116-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e5dd167c-d419-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, five years ago, I made a promise to myself. When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – no matter what – I would be a voice for the voiceless, that I would speak for those who had been silenced for so long. I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this priorities survey is a key part of keeping it today. Peter, I will never stop fighting for you and your loved ones. But to do my absolute best, I need to know what concerns matter to you most. That’s why I’m counting on you to help me get 5,000 responses to my July Priorities Survey. | | In recent months, we've put a stop to anti-abortion extremists, taken on the epidemic of senseless gun violence, and fought against record amounts of LGBTQ+ hate – all because my supporters told me how much those issues meant to them. But the year is halfway over – and I need your input as we look ahead to the rest of 2023. So, please: I’m looking for 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities. | | Thank you for helping me fight for you, Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: I’m grateful for you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65900909/414786461/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZmYjMyMjAtZDgxOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bYn4SRNl0AVvA5JS37Y8J-06cNMC_09rJ2CvlcfzUIs=)
Great news, Peter!

We've spent the weekend crunching the numbers and with your help, our campaign was able to hit our fundraising goal with a few moments to spare before the FEC filing deadline. I’m so proud of our hard work!

Passing this test is a huge deal.

Orange County families deserve a fighter in Congress -- someone who will work every day to save reproductive rights, ensure affordable health care, and protect our climate. The widespread support we’ve received is proof that our campaign continues to gain traction.

So thank you, Peter. Your support is giving us the resources we need to get our message out to every voter in CA-47. I’m so grateful for all that you do.

I hope you have a safe and fun Fourth of July.

In unity,

Joanna

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your outpouring of support for our Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline last Friday.

There is so much at stake with the work that we’re doing, from kitchen table issues like lowering everyday costs for working families to continued attacks on our basic individual freedoms.

We’re building our people-powered campaign to win, but to ensure we’re victorious again in 2024, we need to reach every budget goal we set, especially important public filing deadlines like this one.

So, thank you for stepping up and having my back.

Wishing you a safe, happy and healthy 4th of July!

— Dan

**_[P.S. If you didn’t have a chance to give before the deadline, you can still make a donation now to help support our summer grassroots efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65900968/414786542/-630682683?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230703_FR_1.1_0_1MO_T_candidate_NA_NA_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRkNDcyNi1kODE5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW1RdjbGY9StJDXjONVXXW83hs-eUPl1lfQPHSTRrlg=)_**

clean_body: | I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your outpouring of support for our Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline last Friday. There is so much at stake with the work that we’re doing, from kitchen table issues like lowering everyday costs for working families to continued attacks on our basic individual freedoms. We’re building our people-powered campaign to win, but to ensure we’re victorious again in 2024, we need to reach every budget goal we set, especially important public filing deadlines like this one. So, thank you for stepping up and having my back. Wishing you a safe, happy and healthy 4th of July! — Dan = Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

subject: You made it all possible

body:
| | |
---
Thank you.

Because of supporters like you, we hit our major FEC filing deadline goal. Our report will show that the movement to give kids a voice in the halls of power is starting strong.

With your support, in our first quarter, we’ve hit the ground running in our advocacy efforts—including most recently at Rock the Ride Napa, a gun violence prevention fundraiser and advocacy event that I was honored to join as the keynote speaker.

As we begin our second quarter of the organization, I’m looking forward to keeping up this important momentum. We’ve got a lot planned, and I’ll be sure to keep you posted. To stay updated on our work, _**[make sure to follow Their Future. Our Vote. on Twitter.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhmtaIKc_5a93i_0p98UZWuVSOGG0LoaSlZC9XegosUyLfw8icPXIwIHIAQ4oX8eodMHOKf9WAD4vE-pRAtdxClDyOdYWpUzo-FBwzm_f2gf30XfeP7QgyhFAV4o-x695DDIVCyPmGNY5nwopiStZteYLHUCfmJngE1mOjL1sMeZ3K45LO1oDfzbnFP_t2AyahArJ3AyYSP3mimNi3glfubucg8w-kuOzWRPj9rTYQNruXK_Y-E-HEvNeRRmHl236qba6zaBlj2GCwkFyRADgYC8MejD0R4uTT5wLH5tnwpcwQCd2kEAT_TvVart-a0Zy6g/3xk/Qh6BRzrlRXO_O2Vd_qaafw/h0/Wi9z3cs9mJdDjrGwcocHx38wpkxl7kY3X3MeB-HAuPA)**_
