name: Claire, the NDRC
subject: This fight isn’t over until it’s over, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
there’s still plenty we can do
|
---

Hey team, Claire from the NDRC here! This is a bit of a longer email, so if you’re short on time and you already know how important it is to fight for fair maps ahead of the 2024 election, [**_you can pitch in to fuel our ongoing efforts to stop GOP gerrymandering at this link!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65908978/414794143/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230703_FR_7D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZjdiZDQ1LWRlMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gVV9IpsngBzNIW8QRvWXNSIDvpbJnMcR7A4lOw1Er_0=)

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our movement has secured some incredible victories recently.
* In **_WISCONSIN_** , despite millions in spending from far-right donors in an effort to elect their preferred justice, voters made their voices heard by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it “a critical victory for our democracy.”
* In **_PENNSYLVANIA_** , our grassroots movement helped Democrat Heather Boyd win an important special election, ensuring the state House would remain blue and Democrats will continue to hold the chamber.
* In **_ALABAMA_** , a recent decision from the U.S. Supreme Court required lawmakers to redraw their congressional maps before the next election to increase representation for Black voters. The ruling could also lead to new maps being drawn in states like **_SOUTH CAROLINA_** and **_GEORGIA_**.

| [PITCH IN TO HELP THE NDRC
KEEP FIGHTING FOR FAIRNESS!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65908979/414794144/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230703_FR_7D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZjdiZDQ1LWRlMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gVV9IpsngBzNIW8QRvWXNSIDvpbJnMcR7A4lOw1Er_0=)
---
But it’s not all good news. As A.G. Holder said, _“There are still people who are determined through gerrymandering, through voter suppression, through attacks on our election infrastructure in our nation to try to come up with ways to hold on to power to which they are not entitled.”_ We’re seeing that play out across the country at this very moment.
* In **_NORTH CAROLINA_** , Republicans made an unprecedented move by asking the state supreme court to overturn an earlier ruling requiring fair maps – simply because the makeup of the court changed! The GOP’s efforts to remain in power are so extreme that one commentator wrote, “Democracy is dying in North Carolina.”
* In states like **_OHIO_** and **_MISSOURI_** , the gerrymandered GOP legislature is trying to change the rules to make it harder for voters to protect reproductive rights or to overturn abortion restrictions Republicans impose.
* In **_TEXAS_** , lawmakers passed legislation giving Republican statewide officials control over elections in Houston, one of the state’s most Democratic jurisdictions. The bill is so extreme, it would even allow Republican lawmakers to overturn Houston’s election results.

[PITCH IN TO HELP THE NDRC
KEEP FIGHTING BACK NATIONWIDE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65908987/414794145/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230703_FR_7D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZjdiZDQ1LWRlMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gVV9IpsngBzNIW8QRvWXNSIDvpbJnMcR7A4lOw1Er_0=)
---
This fight isn’t over until it’s over, team, and there’s still plenty we can do. We’re working to protect our fair maps progress, prevent Republican map manipulation, and promote fair redistricting across the country – and we need your help to do it! The way we see it, you have two options:
1. **Get complacent and resign yourself to the fact that Republicans are willing to do whatever it takes to gain unearned power so they can impose their extreme, anti-choice agenda.**
2. **Or commit to the fight for fair maps and do everything you can to stop GOP attacks on our democracy across the country!**

[CHOOSE OPTION 2:
PITCH IN TO THE NDRC!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65908988/414794146/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230703_FR_7D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZjdiZDQ1LWRlMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gVV9IpsngBzNIW8QRvWXNSIDvpbJnMcR7A4lOw1Er_0=)

clean_body: there’s still plenty we can do | Hey team, Claire from the NDRC here! This is a bit of a longer email, so if you’re short on time and you already know how important it is to fight for fair maps ahead of the 2024 election, = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our movement has secured some incredible victories recently. In WISCONSIN , despite millions in spending from far-right donors in an effort to elect their preferred justice, voters made their voices heard by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it “a critical victory for our democracy.” In PENNSYLVANIA , our grassroots movement helped Democrat Heather Boyd win an important special election, ensuring the state House would remain blue and Democrats will continue to hold the chamber. In ALABAMA , a recent decision from the U.S. Supreme Court required lawmakers to redraw their congressional maps before the next election to increase representation for Black voters. The ruling could also lead to new maps being drawn in states like SOUTH CAROLINA and GEORGIA. | = But it’s not all good news. As A.G. Holder said, “There are still people who are determined through gerrymandering, through voter suppression, through attacks on our election infrastructure in our nation to try to come up with ways to hold on to power to which they are not entitled.” We’re seeing that play out across the country at this very moment. In NORTH CAROLINA , Republicans made an unprecedented move by asking the state supreme court to overturn an earlier ruling requiring fair maps – simply because the makeup of the court changed! The GOP’s efforts to remain in power are so extreme that one commentator wrote, “Democracy is dying in North Carolina.” In states like OHIO and MISSOURI , the gerrymandered GOP legislature is trying to change the rules to make it harder for voters to protect reproductive rights or to overturn abortion restrictions Republicans impose. In TEXAS , lawmakers passed legislation giving Republican statewide officials control over elections in Houston, one of the state’s most Democratic jurisdictions. The bill is so extreme, it would even allow Republican lawmakers to overturn Houston’s election results. = This fight isn’t over until it’s over, team, and there’s still plenty we can do. We’re working to protect our fair maps progress, prevent Republican map manipulation, and promote fair redistricting across the country – and we need your help to do it! The way we see it, you have two options: 1. Get complacent and resign yourself to the fact that Republicans are willing to do whatever it takes to gain unearned power so they can impose their extreme, anti-choice agenda. 2. Or commit to the fight for fair maps and do everything you can to stop GOP attacks on our democracy across the country! = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Claire = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Why?So that Crooked Joe can sneak by unscathed until late 2024 and Soros canBUY him a second term. But at a time when our entire Party should be uniting against Biden and his corrupt DOJ’s unlawful attempt to IMPRISON their leading political opponent, a handful of special interest “Republican” mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) have decided to HELP Soros. These cowards are plotting to spend $300 MILLION to undermine our campaign in the primary, making Soros’ plan that much easier. But while a handful of turncoat RINOs who would happily surrender the White House to Biden for 4 more years may have millions of dollars to spend against us, we have something they never will... ...an entire movement – 75 MILLION patriots strong – that will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: WARNING: Move Your Cash Before July 26
body:
There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever...

| Dear Reader, There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever... JFK's assassination... 9/11... The Nixon shock of 1971... What's scheduled to take place on July 26, at 2 pm ET, could be another one of those moments. [Click here to see the details...](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670019a793f54d2a96241729678d4bf6&_e=kVL1vj4dmj40uImwM-XDtaZwWZ-DtJST_50Z94NsQBNP_lkWjAuhw-2WXpvxd3A-Q1cHrllvmtNskYhWH6a05BCAL6NhVMaHUroM5p9H3rhj9eSdUoGNs9OBvCEVGeNkcIa7cRzq-ka3YNQ_3GiVY5ZURINvE4w8rlrrQeyY7Q7ZazlE34dT9rg9ZxWl0DIfYulpIgPq_oZmWEyD6MSL6Y5RwvuM_6iddsrB3nhbVZtlwUlAU9VIQ9IbOo69XJsg) Because those who don't prepare could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

name: John Fetterman
subject: We’re doing big things right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're focused on getting things done in the Senate.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
I take this job really, really seriously. It's an honor to have been elected to fight for PA families + do what I can in Washington to *actually* improve people's lives. 🙏
I didn't come to Congress to make headlines -- unlike some of my colleagues on the far right. So while they're fighting over when and how to impeach President Biden (over... nothing?), **we're focused on the important work in the Senate.**
It might not always make the news, but we're doing big things. Like helping PA farmers and local agriculture with the Protecting Mushroom Farmers Act. Freeing up funding for implementing safer street design for pedestrians with the Shovel Ready Streets Act. And confirming diverse, qualified, impressive judges and administration appointees for roles throughout the government that make a difference in people's lives.
**[These are the sorts of priorities I know you gave me your support so I can fight for. If you're able to, consider chipping in any amount so I can keep up this important work in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230703-1?refcode=em20230703-1-8444&refcode2=8444_434096_AUrF9K&akid=8444%2E434096%2EAUrF9K)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230703-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230703-8444&refcode2=8444_434096_AUrF9K&akid=8444%2E434096%2EAUrF9K)**
I'm really thankful you're part of this team!!
— John 💛
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230703-8444-footer&t=1&refcode2=8444_434096_AUrF9K&akid=8444%2E434096%2EAUrF9K)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

[**July 3, 1775:** Despite being commissioned by the Continental Congress as Commander in Chief on June 19, 1775, George Washington didn’t assume command of the Continental Army until he reached Cambridge, Massachusetts, on July 3. He was selected over other candidates, such as John Hancock, based on his military experience and being from Virginia. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f29ef22ceb9d40c0b4489b1a9db6a3ea&_e=ZYEEIAOjWiAxwm7rqURVZAPiNbAmiBSPeEXQo-AlwPh01xSE0Pkq6QPLimnP6o8SQvHax0OtaecV1w2nuGx345Alo-XZQ9mq8MNSYbYPTgrY8wPEFgx_H_Xjej-lLX_sZLltrxi-GA0kbgMCKfF3gCj2DN7AGKmpX53K_bccAFb_U8qnkYOwmIzYIXLEYZzuzRc7BZE6zaZQbkmMwXpWGCj7lX-SuP8wlL9OoWKfCOa_E0lCTNwLwkzEz1twqRaOzzRIZFv1Ion8aSM7_BgytGZvgPEGC1F8WdtLsnFmsHY%3D) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f29ef22ceb9d40c0b4489b1a9db6a3ea&_e=ZYEEIAOjWiAxwm7rqURVZAPiNbAmiBSPeEXQo-AlwPh01xSE0Pkq6QPLimnP6o8SQvHax0OtaecV1w2nuGx345Alo-XZQ9mq8MNSYbYPTgrY8wPEFgx_H_Xjej-lLX_smiGGqCBZQov10MbbOqdFCNUhik8Ws-atG_KQ_iv_FITR4T87QpkRyJUW2fHA4I2yxQrOukryHg399OWct4NVpOF5d1DYus0cdt2lkCCHSCQ7dgKc8jGjpfQwn0dSz9Wzaa7k-5JNClGBYz2sktIHTuvva-HFYE2GzXkbNxxmfPk%3D)**

The Battle of Gettysburg ended with a Union victory under General George Meade and the Army of the Potomac.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f29ef22ceb9d40c0b4489b1a9db6a3ea&_e=ZYEEIAOjWiAxwm7rqURVZAPiNbAmiBSPeEXQo-AlwPjBfp3rECByA6eNtOv-j0GaI_ddGoFxlpDcmASMT0BlOOiGRZJbzSIoyaj4oPHHeqtQUqu6q18LdSzo5LVRLf9iAJPCnFvEgvpZN1YD0RKa8dkLd89a7HTbJw5Wx4685OaxAgucUQVRrnzDTBu7hxl13nN6R76d99eFjYdCFQP7SgsIJR-R5Rdfui28TZmkD4A50cpjf5ZiVNr2sEq5G9aa) **Source -[gilderlehrman.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f29ef22ceb9d40c0b4489b1a9db6a3ea&_e=ZYEEIAOjWiAxwm7rqURVZAPiNbAmiBSPeEXQo-AlwPjBfp3rECByA6eNtOv-j0GaI_ddGoFxlpDcmASMT0BlOF1uK65SbZQcHIiDjLspsR79QuZUFrEr964wlRsJGaGCAWVv8Tf-EnSOuql7FkM1cEwtvemP8zCrLo-t3VhUlmHyfWA9VjPKjD6eg1BBMs7ywjBjzNbnBCVkO1jR0SvqnpSso4-9iUYgTbjE0HcETSsDjowW0pvJk4QM6FjARvC2)**

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Thank a veteran
body:
Honoring our nation's heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkExRa6NEp3ccTwz3zZC2cDZ15fM_faeW2S3-wHent6Yn3voknamOF4VGEK3rGKs7-_CVZdgFUpYYqHcMtJF_SFAz_gnpt5Wl4LpTHUSEWc50KSr2wAgzRUZJ09fUapl5ImCTJua9DIill3t0B1t8pJU)
---
Friend, Thanks to our veterans, the freedoms we enjoy today have been preserved. Honoring our nation's heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women, guarding their legacy, and honoring their brave sacrifices is incredibly important. [**As we approach Independence Day, I hope you 'll show heroic Americans that their sacrifices are revered and remembered by signing this "Thank you, veterans!" card.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkHBi-P2U_f1e2BBBvA-SYL6_Q0I_qsuDuplFv_6gLCsZU9FGy4kyxnpMcbNe7ejKoNxPOA54xJEsigwrN2hspQUGeZ-smMvBeGsHVfcduZtvRJKDNuZW1o0R7Qu0rD7eQlKSSQY9QuIqT-05bkEjWbb)

Friend we'll pass along your signed Thank you card to veterans like George Ciampa, a veteran of D-Day who stormed the beaches of Normandy at the age of 18, Vince Speranza, who was a machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge when he was only 19 years old, Carl Felton, who left home at the age of 17 to fight in World War II and was also there, and Willie Clemons Jr, who served in World War II and all those decades later was only ever officially thanked for his service when we flew him out for this years' National Memorial Day parade in Washington D.C. For some of these veterans, this could be one of the first times they've ever been officially thanked for their service to our nation. Throughout our history, freedom has been preserved because of the sacrifices made by American Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen and Marines.
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkF3IDZOnD7I-Nb8IjusyVb9t2rhNyKYBV2H5DBX_kzu5sXLjAQtmwvo1463a8dWiah6dG7fAB73XwLYgYpDsyjrPfQVsmGyg5Y9tA_3FXvx1BuaKNm7oBqTwzYFtAMPMdxpfxAiRhkzpQ4MZftu6F65)
---
Every day, we lose legends of World War II, the Korean War, and the Vietnam war. While we have the opportunity to show service members of every generation how grateful we are for their dedication to protecting individual liberty, we must do so. And, we must ensure that all Americans, especially young Americans, fully appreciate -- and never forget -- the sacrifices made by those who have worn the uniform. [**Help express your thanks by signing this thank you card for our veterans before the 4th of July.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkEk0PVDb-ifPZatTOkExr8y5cJAqTLOJfHYmPF25TpPzeif2wro9_CZfs04mGJBC57IWr_OMeIDEgUzJtlzF4O_moLsA1DoKjWfG2sIUAQJIZdJUSZNJCNChkx432dGz5XE0OhhZULHwBUdQCa2SSfd)
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkHDdQ5WkbOPm-PiogrhKizYAaK1Bgb5QAkb1tZyznyRAs6VwOviNxVfDhZyIhLU1fHE8UzdC6G0hhdChJlWkYWW1bZSHOnZ00s5yC_zlyGvmg50MC6H7viuYYZGLUqtCbNzsZEg860VVaCmpO1MNIC4)
---
Please hurry, Friend -- there isn't must time left. We need to gather signatures from thousands of patriotic Americans to show veterans that we honor their sacrifices, no matter where their lives have led them. Our country's greatest heroes are inspiring, and remind us of who this nation is at our very best. A reminder we all need during this time in our history. Veterans' greatest sacrifices have protected our beloved freedoms, and they deserve to know that Americans are grateful for their service, and wish to honor their legacies. [**Before July 4th, please sign this thank you card!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326aad3e4b08458bab37ba7606b15481&_e=tlU5y041K9FNWVXc25gxp0aTo0K9jFEAAxC8x5w73fWluiTh3OB_5PQefBDZ0dce18agowpScNYZma-AKr5KT4LX5WoeAWuzYbvS3dZ8HVQ-kYglSPY3tLo8wMQyToL63-hCvJ3s7UR5KSogvvtpsLMPVQfigKR_TVIv94--jkESiznqF6RIh5cyZmbaaiFxhl_BhgBtfnDQs5LoV1rKQGgiEYOq0gIBIRkONPxQ9arWErvMYNMJZ0tWIu2FOfnIQtHYztihr3vB4SVpWrMmbub_gfeLI6OkhS-Ra_XNRhaHi6LuD92k3eUF6liWw-gf)

subject: Happy Fourth of July From the Editors of the Sun
body:
When an earlier generation of editors sat down to write an editorial on the centenary of our Independence

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d26dc659508844f6a8f8fa4b74dc9678&_e=udIyvauRQvJhWcU5dHBvoqx8JaWme-Ot7dQRBKWLAfzDy87kfLj7CJxYt4iqcpwpAPwZ_JgpOCoRRzQ-YeN5SXVh29DYAL69F84kbnkqgwuk_Ry6nAcmHA-oAPl8c679FL4pyio6PpsaQaLUG_apU5dVgiwgoK-jv8wg1Sb4s-nyOqca6C_B9SY_VvMrpntCKy3mMfwcQH7mpKeU8a76Ogqy84AbzO7jQHbOfMjmTL8%3D)

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d26dc659508844f6a8f8fa4b74dc9678&_e=udIyvauRQvJhWcU5dHBvoqx8JaWme-Ot7dQRBKWLAfzDy87kfLj7CJxYt4iqcpwpOy2swCZqoRe4sygmuPP6NsJyL4QE-gYq-UIHTvjsvpzcR0LxU0BWr70rfpqkvAcSVwLaTwaDTF9-SEgIO-qHe4JOb416AVhE-F9O8AA4AyNsHmb4ggFjkkhgO1OI5b65CowdzIgv7q976cVS-zevotRzU9hSqKS5lgd8JNK2yKY%3D)
---
**FROM THE EDITOR OF THE SUN, SETH LIPSKY** Dear Friends, Happy Fourth of July. All of the editors here at The New York Sun extend that greeting, and what a holiday to join the national conversation by becoming a valued member of the Sun and a part of its enduring conversation -- and starting at only a penny a day. When an earlier generation of editors sat down to write an editorial on the centenary of our Independence, they were full of pride and optimism. In the Civil War, their cause of Union and Emancipation had been victorious. Plus, they wrote, the engines of material progress, capital and labor, were working together. Our population boomed. What astonished us, though, were their warnings in respect of what hadn't been accomplished -- namely, "our political and moral growth." The vast emissions of paper money to fund the war had given us a "currency manufactured at will" that had "bred profligacy and extravagance, both public and private." Sound familiar? It turns out that the row we've been hoeing here at the Sun is a long furrow. It's been more than a century and a half that the Sun has made honest government and honest money its cause. This is why we've offered our penny-a-day introductory price, tapping in to our earliest years while hewing to the same principles by which we've steered the paper throughout. I invite you to join us by subscribing today and becoming part of a newspaper that "Shines for All."
---
[**Join the Sun Now ->**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d26dc659508844f6a8f8fa4b74dc9678&_e=udIyvauRQvJhWcU5dHBvoqx8JaWme-Ot7dQRBKWLAfzDy87kfLj7CJxYt4iqcpwpt7ZUyso6Bhybe1ziG4s2jBubQKthe5yPLPXaeOKipwREeEpR4YppVDDLny7gGY1-al03MamwSdt7DU7lmjr7sBbJP0QblLo6ENym9dW9SwrzH1cXKrywhI5ari2HdAs6N_-xQjev_tjVjbXEP57Y5n-Rm24gGev13HjKaKcnFQk%3D)
---
Yours faithfully,
---
---
**Seth Lipsky** Editor of the Sun

name: Sharice
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I know — you’re probably sick of seeing our emails in your inbox after the flood of messages around our Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline.

**But guess what? Thanks to committed grassroots supporters like you, we SURPASSED our goal!**

I’m so grateful to each and every person who has stepped up for our reelection campaign so far. No matter how much you gave, you’ve moved us a little closer to victory next November, and I can’t thank you enough.

If the last few months are any indication, 2024 is going to be a tough race here in KS-03. But I know we will win it with our incredible grassroots supporters.

I hope you have a fantastic Independence Day tomorrow—thanks again!

Sharice

Thanks to committed grassroots supporters like you, we SURPASSED our goal! I’m so grateful to each and every person who has stepped up for our reelection campaign so far. No matter how much you gave, you’ve moved us a little closer to victory next November, and I can’t thank you enough. If the last few months are any indication, 2024 is going to be a tough race here in KS-03. But I know we will win it with our incredible grassroots supporters. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Endangered monarchs vs. Bayer-Monsanto
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860266?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let Bayer-Monsanto’s dangerous lies and toxic pesticides push endangered monarchs to EXTINCTION. [Take action now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860267?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The summertime breeze is blowing as the sunshine gently illuminates the Earth. A tiny monarch caterpillar hatches, eating its own eggshell before switching to a strict diet of milkweed. Milkweed is a vital part of a monarch’s life, as it is the only place that monarchs lay their eggs and serves as the only food source for monarch caterpillars. In just a couple weeks, the newborn hatchling will build a cocoon around itself before transforming into an adult butterfly, emerging and spreading its vibrant orange wings. More than a beautiful backyard staple, monarchs help keep our planet healthy by feeding on nectar, then pollinating wildflowers, and acting as an important food source for birds, small animals, and other insects. But Friend, these iconic butterflies are rapidly _**DYING OUT**_ \-- so much so that monarch butterflies are now _**OFFICIALLY ENDANGERED.**_ Experts point to the drastic loss of milkweed as a key contributor to the decline in monarchs because the beloved butterfly cannot survive without this vital plant. But milkweed plants are being **DECIMATED** by the widespread use of **toxic herbicides like glyphosate,** the active ingredient in _Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup._ _**The greedy pesticide giant continues to put profit above pollinators and planet, so we urgently need to build a strong grassroots coalition to send a powerful message.**_ [**ADD YOUR NAME NOW: Tell Bayer-Monsanto to STOP selling toxic Roundup that’s pushing monarch butterflies closer to EXTINCTION! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860268?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860269?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Over the last 20 years, **850 million milkweed plants** have vanished across the U.S. And it’s no coincidence that during that same time span, **90% of the North American monarch population** has also __**DIED OUT.**__ Meanwhile, glyphosate remains the most widely used agricultural chemical in the world with nearly **300 million pounds** used every year in the U.S. alone.
_**Are you seeing the correlation here, Friend?**_ Scientists clearly have. They’ve made clear connections between rampant glyphosate use, milkweed decline, and monarch deaths. But Bayer-Monsanto has been caught deliberately _**MANIPULATING SCIENCE**_ and even _**OBSTRUCTING PESTICIDE REGULATIONS**_ in order to deceive the public and keep profits rolling in.
These dangerous lies aren’t just indirectly **hurting all of us** by killing milkweed, threatening monarchs, and putting our planet at risk. Glyphosate has been linked to direct human health impacts like **cancer, reproductive harms, and hormone disruption** \-- __with children being the most AT RISK!__
_**How far will Bayer-Monsanto go to rake in profits at the cost of pollinators, people, and the planet?**_ **Friend, don’t be fooled by Bayer-Monsanto’s corporate lies.** Roundup MUST be pulled off the market immediately, so we’re counting on environmentalists like you to step up today. **[Will you help us get 4,912 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. tonight by adding your name now and forwarding this email to other activists?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860270?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1860269?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action to protect pollinators!
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

name: Senator Brown
subject: want to hear your thoughts, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Hi, friend. This is Sherrod Brown and I want to make sure I hear your thoughts on this issue:
---
I've fought to protect reproductive rights my whole life. You can ask my wife, Connie, who checked my voting record before agreeing to go out with me – if it wasn’t 100%, then no date. All these years later, those rights are under attack like never before and I need to know that you're with me in this fight.
| | **Do you believe we should restore reproductive rights for all?**

– Sherrod
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Senator Sherrod Brown**
Date: Sun, Jul 2, 2023
Subject: a GOP power grab, plain and simple
| | |
---
This could not be more urgent, friend: **C****orrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio passed a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy.** **I’m furious.**
This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution.
We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place.
**I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now?**

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: We need your help before July 4th
body:
Honoring our nation's heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3f3d3b237894ef3920d174a302b1d8b&_e=CnLokd1PgEQuyl6Xklbtl3OdujDpDnBqJ9JZdsqXoizEdb0JIbuRJ5bZf30nzXxUSoMgwrz5KgQ_f5kNgXz4kFKUo3bg_4OLAEn3Yv23W5oDPkGe1_UL3Aafy4Mn9bQzw1OB5iVxdhTcRyaWVQIx4Fa7f87pSNA3h7hJf9VQQzjWa55bxDFVXDpNy2aoM76kRRsEgkcOWP9m4j5Ojsj-1QpqKvfYhtPBIOoTnFBb3fgOXZdRk2I46tnNc2bvqlpgb5os33gMZJATUHwQvaWycYXtvzrZdP51wSo_B-hoka6d8iNpld1JIMnuBCHYcpEO)
---
Friend, Thanks to our veterans, the freedoms we enjoy today have been preserved. Honoring our nation's heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women, guarding their legacy, and honoring their brave sacrifices is incredibly important. [**As we approach Independence Day, I hope you 'll show heroic Americans that their sacrifices are revered and remembered by signing this "Thank you, veterans!" card.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3f3d3b237894ef3920d174a302b1d8b&_e=CnLokd1PgEQuyl6Xklbtl3OdujDpDnBqJ9JZdsqXoizEdb0JIbuRJ5bZf30nzXxUSoMgwrz5KgQ_f5kNgXz4kFKUo3bg_4OLAEn3Yv23W5oDPkGe1_UL3Aafy4Mn9bQzw1OB5iVxdhTcRyaWVQIx4Fa7f87pSNA3h7hJf9VQQzgDPa51R_OJtHGc71C_TAEh417xXosfEfFukG6B2gN6tE2Wk-NVuHi72uu-GOU_3hnOfGyiBUBkyOTeR5s4w_SFijo6KELgl0_WHshl3KKMinlawpJOwK9-65scKq4TfDglnDT3HVD4Jqcubvb_lOO0)

Friend we'll pass along your signed Thank you card to veterans like George Ciampa, a veteran of D-Day who stormed the beaches of Normandy at the age of 18, Vince Speranza, who was a machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge when he was only 19 years old, Carl Felton, who left home at the age of 17 to fight in World War II and was also there, and Willie Clemons Jr, who served in World War II and all those decades later was only ever officially thanked for his service when we flew him out for this years' National Memorial Day parade in Washington D.C. For some of these veterans, this could be one of the first times they've ever been officially thanked for their service to our nation. Throughout our history, freedom has been preserved because of the sacrifices made by American Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen and Marines.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3f3d3b237894ef3920d174a302b1d8b&_e=CnLokd1PgEQuyl6Xklbtl3OdujDpDnBqJ9JZdsqXoizEdb0JIbuRJ5bZf30nzXxUSoMgwrz5KgQ_f5kNgXz4kFKUo3bg_4OLAEn3Yv23W5oDPkGe1_UL3Aafy4Mn9bQzw1OB5iVxdhTcRyaWVQIx4Fa7f87pSNA3h7hJf9VQQziyASpRxKqGRiYMr-nsRt5sEOWp5qXS-ory_PVPKFL90Hm5R_fOnbKtNDFd3JTO4U982bugR-c5VXI9P_eD2cwrIBf98B5v8mgJLfMVPGVu7q8d2jcDOLTxLlzN1wWRPwh_z2-cZXwBOvM6PqO41d3D)

Every day, we lose legends of World War II, the Korean War, and the Vietnam war. While we have the opportunity to show service members of every generation how grateful we are for their dedication to protecting individual liberty, we must do so. And, we must ensure that all Americans, especially young Americans, fully appreciate -- and never forget -- the sacrifices made by those who have worn the uniform. Please hurry, Friend -- there isn't must time left. We need to gather signatures from thousands of patriotic Americans to show veterans that we honor their sacrifices, no matter where their lives have led them. Our country's greatest heroes are inspiring, and remind us of who this nation is at our very best. A reminder we all need during this time in our history. Veterans' greatest sacrifices have protected our beloved freedoms, and they deserve to know that Americans are grateful for their service, and wish to honor their legacies. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25748%2E3422442%2ELUhpid)
Derek,
Last week, six Supreme Court Justices undermined decades of legal precedent to slash the protections afforded to already marginalized Americans.
First, the Court decided to overturn race-conscious admissions. We can't accept a future without racial justice and opportunity in our education system, and we cannot allow an unelected court to harm our democracy.
Then, for the first time in history—and on the last day of Pride Month, no less—the Supreme Court legalized discrimination against a protected class. We are furious by this decision to legally allow hate.
Derek, we need leaders in Washington who will stand up to this corrupt court and demand more for the future of our democracy.
**We will not give up fighting for a just society.**
Katie is running for Senate because those in power need to be held accountable to the people they’re supposed to serve. In the Senate, Katie will fight to clean up corruption through real, substantive legislation. [**Please consider pitching in to our campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230703-1?refcode=EMAJ03_1_SCO_20230703_V1_F&refcode2=25748_3422442_LUhpid&akid=25748%2E3422442%2ELUhpid)
We will keep you updated on these fights for justice.
-Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ03_1_SCO_20230703_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=25748_3422442_LUhpid&akid=25748%2E3422442%2ELUhpid)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=25748%2E3422442%2ELUhpid)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=25748%2E3422442%2ELUhpid)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4288eeab3c684c1b960e05bfc7dab0aa&_e=ZQVvq0K3fJr7zwnGily9-LPe8Z2_tMnahcX4LxHBV7IsW4SS2trd-Cp3_QK3I-pmWHI8053xtgRTluMMZttKFnmi5uA5XNEXv1q-kXxy47wKByIq8FcMZCOL63DvX0epAVuI6T4DWrwaMgGWYfW4jAlN7HRfJhsZ3DoS4jLlM28tHEaaqbzOZCVz_mia5TsErVKsFgHSIaLWquA1k8Jwf-tOk6xpDUs049UvljkkdCGPTiv2wpMeDvJE1FTkrN1p) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4288eeab3c684c1b960e05bfc7dab0aa&_e=ZQVvq0K3fJr7zwnGily9-LPe8Z2_tMnahcX4LxHBV7IsW4SS2trd-Cp3_QK3I-pmWHI8053xtgRTluMMZttKFnmi5uA5XNEXv1q-kXxy47y6GXi6i0dmljvGocEVMs5DF4D3RfNbhsOlQ2dxs7ong6LhZS9igIV3X5tlNJEdX-D-CSuI-y7vVE1zZF_MRWclK540D1TySr_CmUKtuj3Rc3XC_n2H4Y67HG_96h-Kn8ZyFyh-VVip6q-oJQ3Ar1-b) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4288eeab3c684c1b960e05bfc7dab0aa&_e=ZQVvq0K3fJr7zwnGily9-LPe8Z2_tMnahcX4LxHBV7IsW4SS2trd-Cp3_QK3I-pmWHI8053xtgRTluMMZttKFnmi5uA5XNEXv1q-kXxy47zYQNOa7QxCgXUJgOGj5noXBSL0Gp-WEoO9aeVVQ0RCRVkFqYQT3WzWXDUXNEAncdBu7QK9h5OmI2BRBetruutvBQg_WNgoMnJFVYPbc3bCy_BDTp9J8iK3QYddlaeb3k41fERslkrjsG83a2v1lrUc) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4288eeab3c684c1b960e05bfc7dab0aa&_e=ZQVvq0K3fJr7zwnGily9-LPe8Z2_tMnahcX4LxHBV7IsW4SS2trd-Cp3_QK3I-pmWHI8053xtgRTluMMZttKFnmi5uA5XNEXv1q-kXxy47x-RXYQrycVMNxwDOGxjJfvOLNLkCxR5Ms23xDygTMD5OKFJT00B0w_EQmxTg6jHR_iJtoVg8eMqCwHzidWBIkvkFn5jQGAj_G4SQZW2Cus0TNPltL0PrQiOoj3bu_cEYFQJ4_4uxFXGB2GFsXRb7Gq)

name: Team Trump
subject: President Trump Celebrates Fourth of July in Iowa and New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | |

**MEMORANDUM**
**TO:** Grassroots Supporters and America First Conservatives **FROM:** Chris LaCivita and Susie Wiles - Donald J. Trump for President 2024
**DATE** : July 3, 2023 **RE:** President Trump Celebrates Fourth of July in Iowa and New Hampshire Following Massive Rally with 75,000 Patriots in South Carolina
On Saturday, President Donald J. Trump celebrated Independence Day on Main Street in Pickens, South Carolina with a reported 75,000 proud American patriots.
President Trump announced the endorsements of over 250 grassroots leaders representing all 46 counties in the Palmetto State.

**On the heels of his triumphant rally in Pickens, President Trump’s campaign will attend nearly a dozen Fourth of July parades across the First-in-the-South primary state.
**
A survey by [National Public Affairs](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP2yAUhH8NvmGRB8b2wYfuWo7aSGmkVm21l-gFcMIKMLJxrfz7iijp9XujYWZAH50d7x2p3wjAzeqFABD-hQAcxNufozz8PvT08--8p72sxJav8E4A0j2a_9KnS2k8Wpdp3Re6A9WAUoXpdrJpBDAGVXHrGrNDIbFutdJqFLXCCi94MYqjAART2A4YcFYzDjvOuSilAHnh2jRVIyoFLRFss6HUU0CnP9O8-liqyReuu6UUl0ekgcAQMMX14qzCcUQ7L1lEYNgiVVNIJiQCwxrdhLn0kB8lMDBJYPjxTr-twdD99xM9zWax2oRk0dHTbD3Od_pzis4GQ_VYRj0SPqzJn73RdvWE988ZZIbLtM7KEN4re8YnU-gj2msgvH9VfV2ewXjfVnlpeQ7O6mx5ao_XbdnX9wd8fBTv_cdRf2Ufv9pi7nTcrHN2kTUR7JoT5L7_AgAA__8etpVa) shows President Trump trouncing the Republican field by 23 points, dominating Ron DeSantis and state natives Tim Scott and Nikki Haley.
Last week, President Trump headlined the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women’s most successful Lilac Luncheon ever, and later opened his first campaign headquarters in Manchester.

The Trump Campaign announced its initial New Hampshire Grassroots Leadership Team with over 150 dedicated activists and organizers throughout the Granite State’s ten counties, adding to the over 50 New Hampshire legislators who earlier this year endorsed the President’s campaign.
**President Trump’s campaign will celebrate America’s glorious history, our heroes and our freedom at seven major Independence Day parades across the Live Free or Die state.
**
President Trump beats DeSantis by 28 points in the First-in-the-Nation primary state, according to a new [Saint Anselm poll](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuRmRMXbgwKFbRNVG2lvTai-RsSfBWf9B2A7Kt69A2Z5G-r3RzNN70s3WXJ8dOb4RgMnoSAAI-0YATvXb33dx-nPq6f2x_KC94PW6qfCdAKTnjP9XX1dKdNLYjR77QnegGlCqwO4gmqaGqgJeTN2Vo2ZXIZorcA4HWfHrQWlgY6sA5JEXpoMKWHWsGBwYY3UpahAj09jwpuYKWlJXq_GlDl5afU9LdnOpgitsN6U0x93SQGBY17WUPqJ1JepMYJBjyGmbOzTS0ymPBAaPayQwRKmiovfskc7BWhqnsEb6CAmXSEe0Bh9IR6PR7z-pk0lNeaZryFbTEamyKBcazc3TcQmf6Oksl_Sk8RkTOsKGnNzFoTbZEda_whIbjCEvCgnrlbnIF1PSzdLcPGH9VyBfSvAJfSKsb_nWh7h4azRh_Rl-ndvmN_9sd7jXyXr38a5_Vh_ntlg6Pa_GWhPFkdTVbXOwRfcvAAD__zhCpNI). A [New Hampshire Journal / coefficient](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT_NcAM5M7aBA4dsLaoq0l6q_tm9RIPtJt5iQAYS5dtXoGxPtn7zZL_3huPUhz-PBsoXQLwGNwMi0BEQT_Ll96s-_TqZ_OOWvuZGK3nfpvgFEJfH5P9Ln68UPnLoN1qazDVoK7Q2881BV5VEIVBl16YWXMuaLHq21FnGTrIkWdqKtayIs9CgQBKlIDwQkSy0RN2R85WqpLJYgxT3MBRuHLh3H0ta41TYMWZ9c12Wad4ttYAt2zR2vBTsxs5vCsC2D8NfwDb5W_B3oHZNAcisaQBUdGQObr_MditC0fHH9_3Asqp9ZV2uDjXlZJXP685yTqyEk76Uii2g2r7V6xLP0buwRiDzbGSH87gm64GMDWd-Mstx4nAZgMxn6s_JOCx-WIBMrbbS9XnogwMyXfl2SUnf3h473HdGJr6_um_i_WedpcZN99D3YdYlSHHZHGzp_wUAAP__A5uShA) poll finds Trump with a 34 point lead against DeSantis.

On Friday, President Trump returns to Council Bluffs, Iowa where he will tout his incredible record of fearlessly defending Iowa farmers and delivering for Iowa's agriculture and Ethanol industries.

[**Please reserve your tickets today to see President Trump in Council Bluffs, Iowa on July 7.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxkkUGvmz4QxD-NuW1E1sbAgcP__RFVFelJvbTVu0SOdwPOw4YakyjfviJNeqnk02_Wo9GM8fPozvdGlG8CcXC0CEQh_xOIB_X2810ffhxauFzjF2h1oW6biv8LxHSf-e_p02XH3rhxo2WbUYO2Qmszbva6qhTmORbZ0KiyVoSGUOvTWRV7c2Ila1I1seTCUuYazFHmZS5xL6VUO61QnyRxVVSqsFgLld9c2NEUzEiXFFc_7-zks7EZUpqXR6ROYMdXDumfs5ewCOxUkQaYIy-OOCSYzpAGhjW4xARLMokX-PMfLvBwgDQB8eiuHCGyN_FzgSmAN58u9GA8R2cN9JFNAtMbF2B7080I2a3JHz2TW72Q7bMqvcFlWqNlIVvrjubJrPGzcX0Qsn3V8VKmkDgkIdu62NbQxzA6ErL9JuvLL3OnbnjAx5iy9R_v9DX_-F5nsaH55sbRLboUKu-3BFsjvwMAAP__lUmk5w)

RSVP HERE >>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxkkc1u2zAQhJ-Guq0h71I_PujQlHBRGAjQS1PkYjDkSqIjUgJFWU2fvpBr9xKAp2-Wg8GM9tPg2o9GVE8CsXd2FoiCvgjEk3z69VyeXk4KLtf4DVRZyHVT8atATB8T_z-9u-zYazdstFKZbdDUaEzGzb6sa4l5jkXWN3lVtXtTIb1pIy21bdlyYchQZXlf8D5zDeZIeZUT7olI7kqJ5RtZrotaFgYPQuarCzs7Bj3YS4qLn3Zm9NnQ9ClN8y3SUeCRrxzSp7OHMAs8yiL1MEWeneWQYGwh9QxLcIktzEknnuHff7jAzQHSCJYHd-UIkb2O7zOMAbx-d6ED7Tk6o6GLrBPoTrsA2xtXLei4JH_2bN3iBal7VeUG53GJhgUp4876zoz2k3ZdEKQedTyUMSQOSZA6FNsa5TkMzgpSv4390dbrH_Vyg7cxSfnXZ_s9f_15yGJjp9UNg5vLSsi82xJsjfwNAAD__9-NpUM)

President Trump previously announced endorsements from over 150 elected officials and grassroots leaders in all 99 counties in the Hawkeye State.
**President Trump’s campaign will join more than 30 Independence Day parades in Iowa to celebrate American Liberty founded 247 years ago.
**
A recent survey by [McLaughlin & Associates](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUFv3CAUhH8NvmHhB8b2wYemaKtqpUhVpaTKZUXg7ZoIsGtwSP595NVmr9-MYGaeDot358-RdA8EYHI2EQDCfxCAo3j49yiPz0dF397XX1TJVpRdhZ8EIH8ueLfeXqkxaOd32qnKjmB6MKbCsZF9L4AxaKtpBGYEb6BpUcpBg2RmaHnXomBmYFw3lRuBAWcd49BwzkUtBchXbrFve9EaGIhgxcXazlF7-5bXLSy1mUPlxynnJV0jHQgcSil10Wly8ZLniB86uIjrbiVwiFjS7rnrNKFZMe_QYtIxu0SBgaAWX7dMXaRuLppGOtEzek_PXmd6_ZziR8ZoE_WoLeGHLYdTQOu2QLi6TSJ3mOZtNUi4Mu6kb8zosGh3iYSr79rfyhwzxky4Gtp9dXmK3lnClfzz__2pqOe_yxVej8ZVeHm0v9nL01Cto12K894l2RHBLnuCvfVXAAAA__-bGJob) shows President Trump with a commanding lead over DeSantis in the First-in-the-Nation caucuses, with Trump beating DeSantis by 32 points.
Not only is President Trump dominating DeSantis in South Carolina, New Hampshire and Iowa, he also holds a massive [30-point](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kEHPojAQhn_NcJOUmVLKgYNuw2Zj4nF348XUtmoNBQJFPv_9lxr9Lk3zvJPJM68OY-cvzwaqHSDevJ0BEWgLiHu--38Q-397tbk_pt8bJUq-phR_AWJ8ju5n9L0ld0H7LtFKZbZBI9GYzDWFkJIjY1hmt6Y2lXb8LA2Rluh0bc2l4LLgZypKpsvMN8iQWMUICyLiueAozmSdLCUvDdbA2er73A697uw9TksYczOErGtuMY7zS6kFbHW4Tk7H3s1zygHbtBiwZSL96_RgwTmmcWqXGE7BWb8EIPW-RCQ4D8tkHJAy_qTfzOgwan_tgdTH9pMMfXR9BFJ1mcoSp77zFkg9vtbo7tvK8Bd8dU0qHA_2Dzv-rbOpsePqu87PogLOrskgeX8HAAD___iufBM) lead in Nevada, besting DeSantis 52% to 22%.

Trump for President 2024 DATE : July 3, 2023 RE: President Trump Celebrates Fourth of July in Iowa and New Hampshire Following Massive Rally with 75,000 Patriots in South Carolina On Saturday, President Donald J. Trump celebrated Independence Day on Main Street in Pickens, South Carolina with a reported 75,000 proud American patriots. President Trump announced the endorsements of over 250 grassroots leaders representing all 46 counties in the Palmetto State. On the heels of his triumphant rally in Pickens, President Trump’s campaign will attend nearly a dozen Fourth of July parades across the First-in-the-South primary state. A survey by shows President Trump trouncing the Republican field by 23 points, dominating Ron DeSantis and state natives Tim Scott and Nikki Haley. Last week, President Trump headlined the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women’s most successful Lilac Luncheon ever, and later opened his first campaign headquarters in Manchester. The Trump Campaign announced its initial New Hampshire Grassroots Leadership Team with over 150 dedicated activists and organizers throughout the Granite State’s ten counties, adding to the over 50 New Hampshire legislators who earlier this year endorsed the President’s campaign. President Trump’s campaign will celebrate America’s glorious history, our heroes and our freedom at seven major Independence Day parades across the Live Free or Die state. President Trump beats DeSantis by 28 points in the First-in-the-Nation primary state, according to a new . A poll finds Trump with a 34 point lead against DeSantis. On Friday, President Trump returns to Council Bluffs, Iowa where he will tout his incredible record of fearlessly defending Iowa farmers and delivering for Iowa's agriculture and Ethanol industries. | President Trump previously announced endorsements from over 150 elected officials and grassroots leaders in all 99 counties in the Hawkeye State. President Trump’s campaign will join more than 30 Independence Day parades in Iowa to celebrate American Liberty founded 247 years ago. A recent survey by shows President Trump with a commanding lead over DeSantis in the First-in-the-Nation caucuses, with Trump beating DeSantis by 32 points. Not only is President Trump dominating DeSantis in South Carolina, New Hampshire and Iowa, he also holds a massive lead in Nevada, besting DeSantis 52% to 22%. Nationally, President Trump trounces DeSantis by 34 points in a new poll, with Trump expanding his lead by 19 percentage points since February. The same poll finds DeSantis trails Trump by 50 points with younger GOP voters. Surveys by and find Trump with a 38-point lead, with DeSantis’s support falling to record lows. A recent survey from shows Trump with 61 percent of the Republican primary vote. Polling by and show President Trump leading the Republican field by 41 and 45 percent, respectively. Four newly released consecutive polls have shown only President Trump can beat Joe Biden. President Trump has a 4 point lead over Biden in the latest poll, a 2 point lead according to and , and a 3 point lead in the latest survey. we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69a030f809254c2fb1c3cda80e65cb0f&_e=ImMcDjkj0nx13aPqpKdlo-ilYmUI7S8DGdrnCmgxA7WZY_a7NK9N-TvYoXpxd20Mv887zYy4OPVTr4h6mutWJn1UgCmJyzUss7LpaMvuv1wWFF-nWl0ZU1RUlwKDl1V_Q-xY3bpWVAPnRX2NZjcFYK1I8KYA7VksTaAlKLTWs5HO_YC6SAO9l-v_RPlAcP1xOcSBv5Zm074gZvDDW8_aUTcGxEYksV0TJkgydM99pK8htO2y_dt4tws0K8l95E428G_qyPjtpbR2dPJS_wcFag9_OpcLoFfmtxE2mn6iJM0tG7GXPpI4mzpR69I-A-6iP3aTNZJ6swjq8KW5Axa5q7I2kEJfEWW7WkK74DxG9X2vI4QXfdrxcy4wdmbehihqQ294IL-wjSK0hFebURtJXaw8jfRsAg1UYLL5UQdGcNFLU5v77aDKwWBH96LUWqPPD5-Kwd0Gu6KFYHE1-w_ybA%3D%3D "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

clean_body: we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | | | | | Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:" | | | | | | Thank you for your time and support, Kevin McCarthy | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friend — Thank you.
I am writing today to thank you and this team for all the support you have given me and our movement since our launch in February.
Last Friday, The Long Run faced its first-ever FEC deadline, and with the stakes so high in 2024, thousands of you showed up to support our movement to elect changemaking candidates across the country. Thank you.
Not only did we hit our goal — we surpassed it. And that proves to me that this team will not back down in our fight to make lasting change.
Thank you.
As we finalize our numbers for our first FEC report, I hope you know that we would not have made it this far without the unwavering support of you and this team.
We have already impacted so many critical races across the country — Judge Janet in Wisconsin, Lashrecse Aird in Virginia, and countless other Senate candidates like Tammy Baldwin, Colin Allred, and Elizabeth Warren. All with your support.
And this is only the beginning. We have a long way to go, and I hope you will continue to stand by our side in The Long Run.
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230703-1-t1&t=1&akid=4616%2E196590%2EW80652)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=4616%2E196590%2EW80652). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=4616%2E196590%2EW80652)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=4616_196590_W80652&akid=4616%2E196590%2EW80652)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4616%2E196590%2EW80652)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Josh
subject: all because of supporters like you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]I just wanted to take a moment and thank you for your incredible support ahead of our second quarterly fundraising deadline of 2023.

It is supporters like you that allow me to continue the fight for Jersey Values and bipartisan progress in Congress. With your help, we can keep this momentum going, so I can hold my seat in 2024 and keep making progress.

The NRCC is studying fundraising reports like these looking for any signs of weakness – but we have shown that we are not backing down from the fight ahead.

Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team, and I am so thankful for your ongoing dedication to our mission.

Talk soon,

Josh

P.S. If you want to help us get July off to a strong start, consider chipping in today by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2307?amount=]
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. name: Team Emerge
subject: we really need your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge
body:
Peter, we need to hear from you ASAP.
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65912400/414801753/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1247-su-nd&refcode=jtk1247-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYmYzMWEzLWVkMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=flgCLzmdXefgXOkXuy39ctseGHTEK3eZ4wWRHM_UJYQ=&emci=984f724f-8416-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7ebf31a3-ed19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
Peter, we need to hear from you ASAP.

We’re now halfway through 2023, and Emerge women across the country are gearing up for the critical fights ahead.
2022 was a huge year for trailblazing Democratic women, and we’re not slowing down now. This spring, our Emerge alums achieved a whopping 91% win rate in state and local elections! And with a 75% win rate in the primaries overall, **more than ****100 Emerge women will be on the ballot this November!**

But we MUST seize every opportunity we can to empower more Democratic women who will fight for our communities – from school boards to the U.S. Congress – and we can't do it alone.
**That’s why we’re asking top supporters like you to take our Emerge Community Survey today. Right now, we’re still 137 responses short of our goal, and we need your input before our survey closes tomorrow at midnight.[Please: Will you take just two minutes to share your feedback now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65912408/414801758/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1247-su-nd&refcode=jtk1247-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYmYzMWEzLWVkMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=flgCLzmdXefgXOkXuy39ctseGHTEK3eZ4wWRHM_UJYQ=&emci=984f724f-8416-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7ebf31a3-ed19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65912409/414801764/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1247-su-nd&refcode=jtk1247-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYmYzMWEzLWVkMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=flgCLzmdXefgXOkXuy39ctseGHTEK3eZ4wWRHM_UJYQ=&emci=984f724f-8416-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7ebf31a3-ed19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
The Republican attacks on our basic rights are staggering, Peter, but Emerge women keep stepping up to fight back, and they’re counting on our proven strategy and training programs to win. That’s why, as a member of our Emerge community, your input is so crucial.
**With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first.[So please, will you take our Emerge Community Survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65912411/414801766/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1247-su-nd&refcode=jtk1247-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYmYzMWEzLWVkMTktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=flgCLzmdXefgXOkXuy39ctseGHTEK3eZ4wWRHM_UJYQ=&emci=984f724f-8416-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7ebf31a3-ed19-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses.
– Team Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ZShko813aE2PbaayjFt-qw2?unsubscribedata=54GSQSSkQgnXa7VuCLX193qtx6xABwci4fpth%2BvMzotZVscU1KJGy15NiHQDWQ213%2B8%2FAX6E%2FAk7gkFwrBonYNw2pcr4GdEkQ4d1mxqgxQdcotS7okSP74JMn2WIHbkZq%2FlvQkgicnNBSSirFBh8JQ9X9gN4Iugb9hDTElnOnUCTfp%2FOE6PYLc5Z429yqnyUsK8nFBWlSi7xSfIeTItHlAenUH%2FITdKKjWjqJUT79LMNvx%2BxFVjlac3A4IACA3D4%2B1S4D4MchHqZz%2FTU246tLSmZPV1OnNg8raCu%2Bxofg1h25bVk%2Fw9WgvVOg9u8%2F2W4vhU07aGD6IA0%2BZb31wmJEhH6tPT89oobGgT2pUzC0wFsq3eSqYHBcno0gCZDfWtWznuL03xD5gGhYGR%2BZYSmiwFawJl9VZqVUkzvxdczoyQ%3D) off all our lists instantly. That’s why, as a member of our Emerge community, your input is so crucial. With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first. Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses. – Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. body:

## **Happy Monday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-j/) **The Left Has Gone Bonkers** AOC proposes that **[SCOTUS power be limited and possibly impeached](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-t/)** over their decisions she doesn't agree with. **Biden Wants to Block the Sun** A research document published on the White House website reveals the**[Biden administration is open to studying how to block sunlight ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-i/)**to save the Earth from climate change. **Choices Have Consequences** Bud Light's sales have plummeted so much that **[a glass bottling company in North Carolina was forced to shut down](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-d/)** two of its plants and lay off nearly 650 employees. **Riots in France** Young rioters clashed with police and targeted a mayor's home with a burning car as**[France faced a fifth night of unrest sparked by the police killing of a teenager](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-h/)**[.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axkltl-trhiujldw-k/)

body:
| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear a case that could "threaten to END" Social Security!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14740?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11131%2E9716520%2EnyE2Kh)
**We urgently need to know where you stand:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/14740?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11131%2E9716520%2EnyE2Kh)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/14740?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11131%2E9716520%2EnyE2Kh)
---

It's clear, team: With _Roe_ overturned, **_NOTHING_** is safe from the _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority.

**And now, they're about to hear a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security!** **_65 million Americans_ could LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t let the Supreme Court attack this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _now._ We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. _But we’re still 23 responses short in Pennsylvania!_

**Please answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/14740?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11131%2E9716520%2EnyE2Kh)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/14740?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230703-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11131%2E9716520%2EnyE2Kh)

Team DSCC

Peter, this is so important.

Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country, and you’re one of them.

I was told I could count on you to take one of the most important surveys in the country because of your top supporter status: The Patriot Audit Survey.

The Patriot Audit Survey will set Republican priorities and our agenda for 2023, it’s that important, Peter.

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01dbb03ecc874f2d88081dad1c38fdae&_e=LGsQDGRX0HGxnQXTZbWsasldSRfOeApcC-KUHGpy7t98Wn0mNz4I5fmEUwF71ZOuTX7-RBSWVTd-jFDgmqQKIMSMQGTR9L4ECbekVuwYcDT_-TH8SvlP9s_hVfwWXQ4qFALIEigv7uYsxG5zjj4j4cQ3_1qI2x9zMNIDsF4Q3a0Lrb-Ea0R0Zs1-N-CcpekVMhpsRA5BU9jP3wpTmnSP6do6ZyThD39PxD2zFrlFsfPtr59dnhX_zVPDOCWK41EbufJEROXhJ3J2et_AJrFpH613cYQGDIdW2MrVQMyLX-5mllDvmz7wzgG90DKfTPfH7GxPGPCc3GrGIoBLObF6QwSV7jgJw16u_tLtU9HsR1y5mLXsbXV1r5ncEiTfMKotya6DYZSiNIQZ6-St-Jv57LIzAd7A5pC_4lNfrRp0_fs2bpGZ7Ldnw0lcy4J9iiQb20YR5eLSreJGeNGbs1sLQy2lzc46rD2uUiNj9qQhCxI%3D "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01dbb03ecc874f2d88081dad1c38fdae&_e=LGsQDGRX0HGxnQXTZbWsasldSRfOeApcC-KUHGpy7t98Wn0mNz4I5fmEUwF71ZOuTX7-RBSWVTd-jFDgmqQKIMSMQGTR9L4ECbekVuwYcDT_-TH8SvlP9s_hVfwWXQ4qFALIEigv7uYsxG5zjj4j4cQ3_1qI2x9zMNIDsF4Q3a0Lrb-Ea0R0Zs1-N-CcpekVMhpsRA5BU9jP3wpTmnSP6do6ZyThD39PxD2zFrlFsfPtr59dnhX_zVPDOCWK41EbufJEROXhJ3J2et_AJrFpH613cYQGDIdW2MrVQMyLX-5mllDvmz7wzgG90DKfTPfH7GxPGPCc3GrGIoBLObF6QyTD3hO0J1dwlHY9UsN2Ouea1vzDq1zgkyZr-Fcm5ZlqQmgKHUx3SEVA_QS7U-WK4FaFH7l1k-hfeQ788WBB-kxMYRDUTzGuJX9W_Jr-XHQVjjQoH-8aADnsM1cjifktM9mzbzyLIyZsRVDJhn2pKko%3D "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**
---

clean_body: Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. %recipient.md5hash% | | | | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth. On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out. Here's the truth... The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it. If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut. | | "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!" "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream." Democrats are hoping I give up on you. They're hoping you give up on me. They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values. A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. Here’s the bad news, though: Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are not going to go down without a fight. They’re going to spend millions and millions of dollars blanketing the state in attacks and lies – especially after this first poll proves that Boebert is still incredibly vulnerable. We’ve set a goal of raising $100,000 this week to counter the lies and hold Lauren Boebert accountable – but right now, we’re still short. There’s still time to hit our goal, but Adam is counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if he’s going to finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’ve got momentum on our side, but we can’t afford to lose any ground. Adam is so grateful to have you alongside him on this journey. Thank you, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Personally endorse Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Every endorsement we receive from supporters like you is a powerful sign of strength.
#
Our momentum just keeps getting stronger, Peter.
Last month, Missouri’s election-winning labor movement started to unite behind Lucas Kunce and the grassroots campaign he’s building to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this U.S. Senate seat. Lucas even earned one of the earliest statewide AFL-CIO endorsements in Missouri history!
In the weeks since, dozens of elected officials joined the growing coalition of leaders supporting Lucas — like St. Louis County Chairwoman Shalonda Webb, Jackson County Executive Frank White Jr., Boone County Treasurer Jenna Redel, and so many more. **But now, we’ve got to keep it going.**
Tens of thousands of real people like you have already signed on to personally endorse Lucas — and now, we need to continue proving that our people-powered campaign keeps getting stronger and stronger every day.
**Every endorsement is a powerful sign of strength.[So Peter, will you help us keep up this record-breaking momentum by adding your name today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230703_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=3356%2E614464%2EDVVk0w)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230703_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=3356%2E614464%2EDVVk0w)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power for working people has already put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. But Josh Hawley and all the GOP insiders lining up to support him are determined to tear our movement down.
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of grassroots support to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and finally put real working people in charge of our country — and that’s exactly why we need your help today.
**Personal endorsements from real people like you are one of the best ways we can prove that we’re building a winning grassroots campaign.[Will you help us keep up our record-breaking momentum by endorsing Lucas today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230703_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=3356%2E614464%2EDVVk0w)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230703_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=3356%2E614464%2EDVVk0w)**
Every endorsement, donation, and person like you sharing Lucas’ message early in this race could make all the difference on Election Day.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Colin
subject: Will you help me beat Ted Cruz??
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
A brand new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided.

We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, Peter, I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum.secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-AllredSplit?&refcode=E3249-20230703-AllredSplit-gif-Surrogate&amount=10 [secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-AllredSplit?&refcode=E3249-20230703-AllredSplit-gif-Surrogate&amount=10]
DONATE $5 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-AllredSplit?&refcode=E3249-20230703-AllredSplit-SB-Surrogate&amount=10]
Since we launched this campaign a few months ago, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a brand new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided.
This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest. I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day.
Please, will you donate $5, $10, or any amount that's meaningful to you to my campaign and Future Forum PAC to help defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority? → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-AllredSplit?&refcode=E3249-20230703-AllredSplit-SL-Surrogate&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Colin Allred
